instructions: Universal template for all item types. Only include fields that apply to the item.
Leave out any field that is false, null, empty, or not relevant to this item type.
Vendor bools (basil, echo, jorin, etc.) must be true if that vendor is any kind of source.
Use vendor_recipe_cost for recipe purchases, vendor_item_cost for pre-built item purchases.
If a pre-built item is sold bound by a vendor, use: vendor_item_cost: { bound: true, amount: 1234 }
isrecipe: true means this item has a purchasable recipe from at least one vendor.
requires_recipe: false means the item can be crafted at alchemy WITHOUT buying a recipe first.
alchemy_cost is the crown cost to run the alchemy machine when crafting.
bound is never top-level — it only appears inside a vendor_item_cost object when that specific vendor binds it.
If no fields in acquisition apply, omit the acquisition block entirely.

template.name: item name
template.category: sword | handgun | bomb | helmet | armor | shield | material | token | battle_sprite | battle_sprite_pod | costume_helmet | costume_armor | costume_accessory
template.star_level: 0-5 or null for battle sprites and costumes
template.is_reskin: true only if this item is a reskin of another
template.reskin_of: exact name of the source item if is_reskin is true

acquisition.isrecipe: true if any vendor sells a purchasable recipe for this item
acquisition.requires_recipe: false ONLY if craftable at alchemy without buying a recipe
acquisition.mysterious_alchemy: true if craftable at the Mysterious Alchemy Machine
acquisition.sanctuary_alchemy: true if craftable at the Sanctuary Alchemy Machine
acquisition.krogmo_alchemy: true if craftable via Krogmo alchemy
acquisition.basil: true if basil is any kind of source
acquisition.basil_recipe_cost: crown cost if basil sells the recipe
acquisition.basil_item_cost: crown cost OR { bound: true, amount: cost } if basil sells the pre-built item
acquisition.echo: true if echo is any kind of source
acquisition.echo_recipe_cost: crown cost if echo sells the recipe
acquisition.echo_item_cost: crown cost OR { bound: true, amount: cost }
acquisition.jorin: true — same pattern applies for every vendor in vendor_list above
acquisition.supply_depot: true if available in the supply depot
acquisition.supply_depot_item_cost: crown cost or energy cost if applicable
acquisition.prize_box: true if obtainable from any prize box
prize_box_names: list of specific prize box names
acquisition.auction_house: true if cycles through the featured auction house
acquisition.mission_reward: true if given as a mission reward
acquisition.expansion_reward: true if from expansion content missions
acquisition.promotional: true if a promotional or limited-time item
dropped_by: monster or source description
acquisition.alchemy_cost: crown cost to run the alchemy machine

recipe.recipe_cost: base crown cost of the recipe
recipe.alchemy_cost: crown cost to craft at alchemy machine

template.obsolete: true only if the item is no longer obtainable
template.sprite_name: battle sprites only — base sprite name lowercase e.g. drakon
template.variant: battle sprites only — variant name e.g. Divine

abilities.name: skill name
abilities.base_skill: for ultimates — which base skill this replaces

used_to_craft: item names this material is used to craft

cold iron vanquisher.name: cold iron vanquisher
cold iron vanquisher.description: a powerful cold iron blade forged for the singular purpose of hunting down and destroying the undead.
cold iron vanquisher.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched.

divine avenger.name: divine avenger
divine avenger.description: an upgraded avenger formed from the purest sun steel. there are few foes remaining in this world that are worthy enough to be defeated by such a fine blade, and there are still fewer heroes worthy of wielding it.
divine avenger.notes: divine avenger's speed bar is equal in length to troika 's, while gran faust's speed bar is equal in length to leviathan blade 's. in reality, troika combos more slowly than gran faust and divine avenger do, and those swords combo more slowly than leviathan blade does. furthermore, divine avenger charges more quickly than does gran faust. (see data .) the "sun steel" mentioned in this item's description is probably referring to the sun silver material in its recipe. the visual glow around this blade is similar to the excalibur in sonic and the black knight . history release 2011-04-04 : this item has been available since the game officially launched. release 2011-04-27 : until this release, this item and fang of vog were the only 5-star elemental swords. release 2011-10-20 : the charge attack was changed from this to this . this current charge attack summons the blades in a closer cluster. the "blocked by wall" behavior was part of this change as well.

dread venom striker.name: dread venom striker
dread venom striker.description: an assassin's armament whose edge causes deep wounds that seep with vitriol. you should probably store it separately from your snacks.

fang of vog.name: fang of vog
fang of vog.description: a sword said to be created from the fang of the fire beast, vog.
fang of vog.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched. it used to drop from bosses in the lionheart gate during the beta testing phase. little is known about the fiery deity vog . the fang of vog is part of the vog gear. the items in this set include: vog cub cap vog cub coat fang of vog

gran faust.name: gran faust
gran faust.description: an upgraded faust forged from pristine-quality shadow steel. its charge attacks are powerful enough to curse its wielder, but that hasn't stopped devilites from treasuring these rare blades even more highly than their meager vacation time.
gran faust.notes: gran faust's speed bar is equal in length to leviathan blade 's, while divine avenger's speed bar is equal in length to troika 's. in reality, troika combos more slowly than gran faust and divine avenger do, and those swords combo more slowly than leviathan blade does. furthermore, gran faust charges more slowly than does divine avenger. (see data .) "gran faust" and "faust" are named after the german faust folktale, in which a man sells his soul to the devil for power and knowledge. the visual glow around this blade is similar to the excalibur in sonic and the black knight . despite its description, it actually does not use shadow steel in its crafting recipe. tier 3 phantom monsters used to wield this blade. [1] at some point their sword was changed to something resembling a magenta cutter . history release 2011-04-04 : this item has been available since the game officially launched. release 2011-04-27 : it was the only 5-star shadow sword until acheron was introduced in this update. release 2013-07-30 : its recipe was changed.

leviathan blade.name: leviathan blade
leviathan blade.description: a rare treasure of the spiral order, the blows from this mythical sword are said to rain down upon its victims like the water from a tidal wave.
leviathan blade.notes: the leviathan blade is part of the standard spiral order set. the items in this set include: azure guardian helm azure guardian armor aegis nitronome valiance leviathan blade

wild hunting blade.name: wild hunting blade
wild hunting blade.description: a legendary cutter feared by even the mightiest of wolvers and chromalisks.

items.description: striking with the savage power of the underworld, this dark weapon has been known to drive weak-minded knights to the brink of madness.
items.notes: acheron is a river in greece. in greek mythology, it was one of the rivers of the underworld. acheron and the other swords in its alchemy path resemble the katana , a sword which was used by the samurai of feudal japan. these swords are the only swords in the game where the knight holds the scabbard in the opposite hand. compared to its predecessor, silent nightblade, acheron has a different scabbard, a larger blade, and a purple haze. history release 2011-04-27 : this item was introduced to the game. before this release, the brandish line did not go past 3 stars. release 2012-01-04 : its charge attack was strengthened. release 2013-10-23 : its damage output was increased when obsidian edge was introduced in this update.

amputator.name: amputator
amputator.description: the culmination of slime family research, the heated reciprocating blades cut through all slimes with surgical precision and prevent their gelatinous bodies from reforming.
amputator.notes: this item has been available since release 2017-05-11 .

combuster.name: combuster
combuster.description: combining the principles of the skylark's engines with the technology powering the blast furnace produced this brutal blade, which can ignite even the most flame-retardant materials at a distance.
combuster.notes: the combuster is part of the standards weapons that can inflict fire . the items in this set include: ash of agni magma driver combuster

fearless rigadoon.name: fearless rigadoon
fearless rigadoon.description: the ultimate in paralyzing piercers, it's unclear whether its elegance or its wicked bite is what leaves opponents stupefied.
fearless rigadoon.notes: the rigadoon is a lively dance from the early modern period, when fencing swords were popular in europe. history release 2011-04-27 : this item was introduced along with the other piercing swords 2012: its length was decreased, without any announcement release 2013-07-30 : its recipe was changed.

final flourish.name: final flourish
final flourish.description: the premier armament of the serious fencer, it can riposte just as easily as it can rip up foes.

furious flamberge.name: furious flamberge
furious flamberge.description: great fencers can carve their name into their opponents. legendary ones brand it there.

glacius.name: glacius
glacius.description: mixing some advanced theories on cryogenics with the technology powering the cooling chamber produced this advanced armament, which is capable of flash-freezing the most formidable of foes.
glacius.notes: the glacius is part of the standards weapons that can inflict freeze . the items in this set include: shivermist buster hail driver glacius

barbarous thorn blade.name: barbarous thorn blade
barbarous thorn blade.description: a mythical blade that lashes out with the fury of the snarbolax itself. those who wield it claim to feel the fiery stare of the beast upon them whenever they close their eyes.
barbarous thorn blade.notes: the barbarous thorn blade is part of the frumious fang token reward line. the items in this set include: snarbolax cap snarbolax coat barbarous thorn shield dark briar barrage barbarous thorn blade

sudaruska.name: sudaruska
sudaruska.description: a rugged weapon for the knight who is more than willing to trade style and panache for ridiculous amounts of blunt force trauma.
sudaruska.notes: troika , khorovod (russian: хоровод) , and sudaruska are apparently named after russian dances. history release 2011-08-02 : this item was introduced. release 2012-03-22 : its charge attack was changed. release 2013-07-30 : its recipe was changed. release 2018-07-10 : its tooltip was updated to indicate the ability to cause stun.

triglav.name: triglav
triglav.description: no stories have been told about this almighty blade, but that's only because people are rarely in the mood to talk after having been crushed by a mountain.
triglav.notes: grintovec , jalovec , and triglav are all named after mountains in slovenia with triglav being the tallest. according to wikipedia (with citation), the mountain triglav is probably not named after the slavic god triglav . history release 2011-08-02 : this item was introduced along with the king krogmo's coliseum . release 2012-03-22 : its charge attack was changed. release 2013-07-30 : its recipe was changed. release 2018-07-25 : its tooltip was updated to indicate the ability to cause freeze.

voltedge.name: voltedge
voltedge.description: combining spiral capacitor technology with samples recovered from the ironclaw munitions factory produced the blade, which can output a particularly hazardous 1.21 gigawatt discharge.
voltedge.notes: the item description alludes to the movie back to the future , in which 1.21 gigawatts of power were required to propel the delorean through time. the voltedge is part of the standards weapons that can inflict shock . the items in this set include: voltaic tempest storm driver voltedge history release 2011-08-02 : this item was introduced along with the king krogmo's coliseum . release 2012-01-04 : its charge attack was strengthened.

warmaster rocket hammer.name: warmaster rocket hammer
warmaster rocket hammer.description: designed by warmaster seerus himself, this nefarious gremlin weapon is equipped with a rocket engine that can launch the wielder forward with a powerful hammer smash. this final, perfected design is truly befitting the grand arsenal of the great warmaster seerus.
warmaster rocket hammer.notes: this item has been available since release 2012-02-29 . the warmaster rocket hammer is part of the tier 3 operation crimson hammer gear. the items in this collection include: perfect mask of seerus dark retribution warmaster rocket hammer

obsidian edge.name: obsidian edge
obsidian edge.description: a sinister sword made from the obsidian obelisks found within the realm of the apocrea. simply holding it makes you somehow feel guilty of an unknown crime.
obsidian edge.notes: this item was introduced 2013.18 23 october 2013 during the first shroud of the apocrea event. "apocrean" items seem to be described in the style of lovecraftian horror . the obsidian edge is part of the shroud of the apocrea gear. the items in this set include: obsidian crusher obsidian carbine obsidian edge obsidian obstacle

celestial saber.name: celestial saber

prize_box_names: randomly from an equinox prize box

celestial saber.description: a special saber used to resemble isoran spacefarers of old as they sliced across the night sky. with this equipped, your foes are sure to see stars.
celestial saber.notes: it is very similar to the leviathan blade : it has similar attack behavior and statistics, but the celestial saber can also inflict stun. the celestial saber had more visual information provided for it than usual from the game's staff : they uploaded an animation of this weapon's attacks, and linked to it in this forum post. the celestial saber is part of the equinox set. the items in this set include: celestial shield celestial saber celestial vortex celestial orbitgun history 2014.260 17 september 2014 : this item was introduced during the second equinox prize box promotion . release 2018-07-25 : stun tooltip was added.

sweet dreams.name: sweet dreams

prize_box_names: randomly from a slumber prize box

sweet dreams.description: don't be fooled by this weapon's fluffy exterior. it hits much harder than it looks. the perfect weapon for fighting things that go bump in the night.
sweet dreams.notes: it has similar stats as the cold iron vanquisher . the pillow has the same normal offense and attack speed, with a lower damage bonus vs. undead and a chance to inflict stun with charge. it sheds feathers when swung as well as when its charge is released. the sweet dreams is part of the slumber weapons set. the items in this set include: sweet dreams teddy bear buckler history 2015.25 19 august 2015 : this item was released during the slumber prize box promotion august 2015 . release 2018-07-25 : stun tooltip was added. 20 august 2015 : for a short time players could suffer friendly fire from its charge attack. this was a bug , as weapons are not supposed to damage players outside of the coliseum .

turbillion.name: turbillion
turbillion.description: an ostentatious mechanized blade whose turbine crackles with the power of a thousand storms.
turbillion.notes: this item has been available since release 2019-08-07 . the name, and some elements of the visual design, appear to reference the tourbillon , which is a piece of machinery in mechanical watches.

ascended calibur.name: ascended calibur
ascended calibur.description: made of a rare alloy of sun silver, knights talented enough to possess caliburs as fine as this one typically bond with and name their blades.

avenger.name: avenger
avenger.description: a holy sword created in another time to arm knights who fought against the legions of the underworld.
avenger.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched.

cold iron carver.name: cold iron carver
cold iron carver.description: an enchanted sword crafted from cold iron whose blade wards off the creatures of the dark.
cold iron carver.notes: during the beta, the cold iron carver could be crafted directly from the 2-star calibur , making for a shortcut to a 4-star sword. cold iron in folklore is said to harm or repel the undead .

faust.name: faust
faust.description: a powerful, cursed sword forged in the underworld. its powerful charge attacks can sometimes curse the one that wields it.
faust.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched. faust and gran faust are named after the german faust folktale, in which a man sells his soul to the devil for power and knowledge. while faust's speed bar is longer than avenger's, it seems that it is just a mistake. the two swords swing equally quickly. it is also worth noting that faust's charge time is significantly shorter than gran faust's. gran faust and faust are the only weapons that inflict the curse status.

hunting blade.name: hunting blade
hunting blade.description: a jagged edge used for finishing off big game. it cuts through beasts like butter.

khorovod.name: khorovod
khorovod.description: a low-tech, but nonetheless well-made sword whose brutal strikes can stun unsuspecting enemies. wielding it makes you feel like dancing.
khorovod.notes: troika , khorovod (russian: хоровод) , and sudaruska are apparently named after russian dances. history release 2011-04-04 : this item has been available since the game officially launched. release 2011-08-02 : the sudaruska , the 5-star of this line was introduced. release 2012-03-22 : its charge attack was changed. release 2013-07-30 : its recipe was changed. release 2018-07-10 : its tooltip was updated to indicate the ability to cause stun.

vile striker.name: vile striker
vile striker.description: a sneaky saber that stores a payload of poison. its serrated edge is not meant for cutting bread!

winmillion.name: winmillion
winmillion.description: an ornate blade that propels bolts of energy outward with every swing. inexperienced users have been known to cut themselves when first practicing with it.

advanced cautery sword.name: advanced cautery sword
advanced cautery sword.description: a cautery sword with an additional saw function adapted to cutting through the bony spines of larger lichen colonies.
advanced cautery sword.notes: this item has been available since release 2017-05-11 . this weapon's damage is identical to that of the cold iron carver , which is also a three hit sword that has a damage bonus to an enemy type.

blazebrand.name: blazebrand
blazebrand.description: a high-tech blade that fuses spiral and clockwork technology. it can produce a concentrated high-temperature explosion that is harmless to knights.
blazebrand.notes: despite what the description implies, the blazebrand is more than capable of lighting knights on fire in lockdown .

blizzbrand.name: blizzbrand
blizzbrand.description: a high-tech blade that fuses spiral and clockwork technology. it can produce a concentrated low-temperature explosion that is harmless to knights.
blizzbrand.notes: despite what the description implies, the blizzbrand is just as capable of flash-freezing knights in lockdown as it is of freezing monsters.

daring rigadoon.name: daring rigadoon
daring rigadoon.description: a savage skewer that will slow even the most salubrious of foes to a crawl.
daring rigadoon.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-27 along with the other piercing swords. its length was decreased, without any announcement, sometime during 2012. the rigadoon is a lively dance from the early modern period, when fencing swords were popular in europe.

fierce flamberge.name: fierce flamberge
fierce flamberge.description: a scorching saber whose main thrust is to rotisserie your foes.

grand flourish.name: grand flourish
grand flourish.description: a fanciful blade for those who prefer to solve their problems with a hop, a skip and a stab.

silent nightblade.name: silent nightblade
silent nightblade.description: crafted with some of the most devilish materials found on cradle, this inky blade can explode with fiendish fury.
silent nightblade.notes: the silent nightblade line of swords is the only sword in the game where the knight holds the sword's sheath in the opposite hand. the silent nightblade and its sheath are both similar in appearance to a katana , a sword which was used by the samurais of feudal japan.

dark thorn blade.name: dark thorn blade
dark thorn blade.description: a savage sword whose strength has been fortified by an offering of souls to the beast within.
dark thorn blade.notes: the dark thorn blade is part of the frumious fang token reward line. the items in this set include: dark thorn shield spike shower dark thorn blade

boltbrand.name: boltbrand
boltbrand.description: a high-tech blade that fuses spiral and clockwork technology. it can produce a powerful electrical discharge that is harmless to knights.
boltbrand.notes: despite what the description implies, the boltbrand is just as capable of electrocuting knights in lockdown as it does monsters.

jalovec.name: jalovec
jalovec.description: a shivery sword for knights who think it'd be cool to inflict an avalanche of pain upon their foes.
jalovec.notes: grintovec , jalovec , and triglav are all named after mountains in slovenia with triglav being the tallest. history release 2011-08-02 : this item was introduced along with the king krogmo's coliseum . release 2012-03-22 : its charge attack was changed. release 2013-07-30 : its recipe was changed.

arc razor.name: arc razor
arc razor.description: a finely-crafted mechanical sword that flings sharp bolts of energy outward when swung.

kamarin.name: kamarin
kamarin.description: a low-tech sword that's less effective at cutting than it is at crushing your enemies and seeing them driven before you.
kamarin.notes: kamarin's tooltip was changed to "slight chance of causing moderate stun" (previously fair chance) in release 2018-07-10 . the kamarin's description refers to one of arnold schwarzenegger's lines in conan the barbarian .

sealed sword.name: sealed sword
sealed sword.description: a mysterious sword of great untapped potential. it hums with raw power.
sealed sword.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched. the original plan was that it would have nine seals on it and using it would break each seal one by one. once it was free of seals, you could either turn it into an avenger or gran faust via a random element in the clockworks. this all changed a long time ago when alchemy became a part of the design. 1

striker.name: striker
striker.description: a fast sword favored by members of the stealthier branches of the spiral order.

tempered calibur.name: tempered calibur
tempered calibur.description: a calibur reforged and tempered by the most advanced techniques available to weaponsmiths of the spiral order.

cautery sword.name: cautery sword
cautery sword.description: a sword adapted from a medical tool, its heated blade reduces tissue damage. it is very formidable at destroying monsters of the slime family.
cautery sword.notes: the cautery sword's damage can be compared to the tempered calibur . the cautery sword deals 5% more damage than the tempered calibur against slimes. against all other enemy types the cautery sword does 15% less damage than the tempered calibur and the same as the arc razor . as a side note this sword is essentially useless because of its menial damage output. it seems that the sword was intended for defeating the royal jelly , however the nightblade or fireburst brandish will provide higher dps.

fireburst brandish.name: fireburst brandish
fireburst brandish.description: an upgraded brandish infused with the elemental essence of fire.

flamberge.name: flamberge
flamberge.description: a fiery foil that burns through as it runs through.
flamberge.notes: the terms flamberge , flambard , and flammard all mean "flame blade".

iceburst brandish.name: iceburst brandish
iceburst brandish.description: an upgraded brandish infused with the elemental essence of ice.

nightblade.name: nightblade
nightblade.description: a short slicer infused with the essence of the underworld.
nightblade.notes: the nightblade line of swords is the only sword in the game where the knight holds the sword's sheath in the opposite hand. the nightblade and its sheath are both similar in appearance to a katana , a sword which was used by the samurais of feudal japan.

rigadoon.name: rigadoon
rigadoon.description: a stunning saber that will leave your opponent quite off their guard.
rigadoon.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-27 along with the other piercing swords. its length was decreased, without any announcement, sometime during 2012. the rigadoon is a lively dance from the early modern period, when fencing swords were popular in europe.

swift flourish.name: swift flourish
swift flourish.description: an upgraded flourish for knights who make a point of dispatching opponents with a bit of flair.

twisted snarble barb.name: twisted snarble barb
twisted snarble barb.description: a gnarled snarble barb enhanced to swing with a satisfying "snicker-snack".
twisted snarble barb.notes: "snicker-snack" refers to the vorpal sword from lewis carrol's classic nonsense poem " jabberwocky ". the vorpal sword was the only sword capable of defeating the jabberwock, of which the snarbolax in spiral knights may be reminiscent. the twisted snarble barb is part of the frumious fang token reward line. the items in this set include: twisted targe twisted spine cone twisted snarble barb

grintovec.name: grintovec
grintovec.description: your enemies will surely enjoy the cool, refreshing sensation of being hit by a glacier.
grintovec.notes: the grintovecs's attacks excel particularly at knocking back many enemies at once before they can strike, clearing them away if the player is being boxed in. the downside is that against single targets the slow attack speed hinders the overall damage per second, and against larger enemies that are more resistant to knock-back or enemies with ranged attacks, the player may find themselves getting counter-attacked before their own attack animation finishes. for this reason it's essential to have an alternative to the grintovec's usual attack at hand when situations such as this present themselves. grintovec , jalovec , and triglav are all named after mountains in slovenia with triglav being the tallest. history release 2011-08-02 : this item was introduced along with the king krogmo's coliseum . release 2012-03-22 : its charge attack was changed. release 2013-07-30 : its recipe was changed.

shockburst brandish.name: shockburst brandish
shockburst brandish.description: an upgraded brandish infused with the elemental essence of lightning.

stable rocket hammer.name: stable rocket hammer
stable rocket hammer.description: designed by warmaster seerus himself, this nefarious gremlin weapon is equipped with a rocket engine that can launch the wielder forward with a powerful hammer smash. this particular model is a more stable version that blew up gremlin test subjects far fewer times than the prototype.
stable rocket hammer.notes: this item has been available since release 2012-02-29 . the stable rocket hammer is part of the tier 2 operation crimson hammer gear. the items in this collection include: flawed mask of seerus dark reprisal mk ii stable rocket hammer

brandish.name: brandish
brandish.description: a reliable blade whose lack of ornamentation belies its strength.
brandish.notes: the word "brandish" in english means "to wield", especially in the context of resistance or conflict. the word originates from the french word "brandir" which means to wave a weapon in triumph, or in threat.

calibur.name: calibur
calibur.description: a standard issue sword awarded to spiral knights who have proven themselves in the field.
calibur.notes: the name "calibur" is a direct reference to excalibur but with the prefix ex removed. in haven , npc's knights can be seen wielding a calibur when they patrol the streets of haven.

cutter.name: cutter
cutter.description: a bandit's sword with a vicious row of jagged teeth.
cutter.notes: the art for this item changed at some point. this item used to have a striped blade like the 3-star striker . usage guide cutter can be tricky to master without knowing its attack patterns and mechanics. 1st attack: fast, arcing swing in front of knight leaving a lighted trail, followed .25 second later by a 'shadow' sword swing through the same arc. 'shadow' swing causes 1/2 damage of main swing. 2nd-5th attack: knight steps forward and repeats first attack mechanics. the knight will step forward on each main swing, but not on the 'shadow' swings that follow the real strikes. each main swing can cause knock-back on a monster (if it can be knocked back). connecting with the 'shadow' swing in each attack may be difficult if the knight is not very close to the monster, as the main swing may knock a monster out of range of the 'shadow' swing. useful tip: trap monsters in corners to get the maximum strike combo on a monster. or, attack monsters resistant/immune to knock-back (like gun puppy series).

searing edge.name: searing edge
searing edge.description: a light blade that sets foes ablaze as it slashes. the technology that keeps the hilt from catching fire is more advanced than the sword itself.

shocking edge.name: shocking edge
shocking edge.description: a light blade that can deliver a painful shock to its victims. youthful knights enjoy waving these around on holidays.

spur.name: spur
spur.description: a mechanized sword with a built in motor that generates energy bursts when used.

troika.name: troika
troika.description: a low-tech sword that makes up for its lack of high internal power with sheer weight and size. it is capable of delivering crushing blows for those that can handle it.
troika.notes: the troika's attacks excel particularly at knocking back many enemies at once before they can strike, clearing them away if the player is being boxed in. the downside is that against single targets, the slow attack speed hinders the overall damage per second, and against larger enemies that are more resistant to knock-back or enemies with ranged attacks, the player may find themselves getting counter-attacked before their own attack animation finishes. for this reason it's essential to have an alternative to the troika's usual attack at hand when situations such as this present themselves. troika , khorovod (russian: хоровод) , and sudaruska are apparently named after russian dances. history release 2011-04-04 : this item has been available since the game officially launched. release 2011-08-02 : the sudaruska , the 5-star of this line was introduced. release 2012-03-22 : its charge attack was changed. release 2013-07-30 : its recipe was changed.

wrench wand.name: wrench wand
wrench wand.description: a heavy hand tool favored by gremlins. it's good for both tightening bolts and cracking skulls.
wrench wand.notes: the wrench wand is the weapon used by gremlin menders . it occasionally makes audible gremlin noises on the third swing. the thwack hammer is another weapon commonly used by gremlins, used exclusively by gremlin thwackers .

flourish.name: flourish
flourish.description: a stylish saber well-appointed to foiling your enemies.

snarble barb.name: snarble barb
snarble barb.description: a bestial blade that can shoot slithy spines at those who would oppose its wielder.
snarble barb.notes: the snarble barb is part of the frumious fang token reward line. the items in this set include: bristling buckler spine cone snarble barb

big beast basher.name: big beast basher
big beast basher.description: it was suggested that this brutally sharp mining pick could probably be used to hunt both beasts and minerals. the clockworks were never the same.

bolted blade.name: bolted blade
bolted blade.description: an upgraded proto sword reinforced with bronze bolts scavenged from the clockworks.

heavy hatchet.name: heavy hatchet
heavy hatchet.description: a big blade intended to fell trees. unsurprisingly, you can also use it to fell enemies, blocks, mineral deposits and most anything else you'd care to hit with it.

hot edge.name: hot edge
hot edge.description: a modified proto sword capable of generating temperatures high enough to burn organic material.
hot edge.notes: the hot edge is part of the aeria games line. the items in this bundle include: ignition helm ignition armor emberbreak shield firecracker spitfire hot edge

static edge.name: static edge
static edge.description: a modified proto sword capable of generating a low-intensity electrical charge.

super slime slasher.name: super slime slasher
super slime slasher.description: a shovel with a wicked edge that's especially well-suited to fighting slimes in the trenches.

thwack hammer.name: thwack hammer
thwack hammer.description: a spirited spanner specially suited to scrapping mechanical enemies.
thwack hammer.notes: the thwack hammer is the weapon used by gremlin thwackers . the wrench wand is another weapon commonly used by gremlins, used exclusively by gremlin menders .

prototype rocket hammer.name: prototype rocket hammer
prototype rocket hammer.description: designed by warmaster seerus himself, this nefarious gremlin weapon is equipped with a rocket engine that can launch the wielder forward with a powerful hammer smash. this particular model is a prototype version.
prototype rocket hammer.notes: this item has been available since release 2012-02-29 . the prototype rocket hammer is part of the tier 1 operation crimson hammer gear. the items in this collection include: fractured mask of seerus dark reprisal prototype rocket hammer

rugged robo wrecker.name: rugged robo wrecker
rugged robo wrecker.description: an upgraded robo wrecker that has assisted a great many constructs in becoming smoldering, scrap metal heaps.

red saber.name: red saber
red saber.description: a saber the color of the burning sun that is given to knights who have shown exemplary bravery in past actions.
red saber.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-01-01 in the deluxe starter pack. this sword is a weapon akin to the cutter family, a fast weapon that is risky to use but very rewarding, that is shifted into a lower star tier. this weapon also causes the fire status ailment with all its swings, including the "shadow" swings that follows every normal attack and the first 4 swings of the charge attack. the red saber is part of the deluxe starter pack. the items in this pack include: tri-guard helm tri-guard armor green ward static flash chilling duelist red saber

beast basher.name: beast basher
beast basher.description: a powerful pick modified to add an extra helping of hurt to beast family monsters.

hatchet.name: hatchet
hatchet.description: a heavy blade used to chop vines and foliage in the wilderness surrounding the rescue camp
hatchet.notes: despite its appearance, the hatchet and heavy hatchet are named after a certain type of axe. this may be a reference to the novel " hatchet " by gary paulson, in which a young boy utilizes a hatchet for a number of improbably things, including hunting.

proto sword.name: proto sword
proto sword.description: a small sword issued to all spiral knight recruits.
proto sword.notes: the proto sword is part of the proto line. the items in this set include: proto shield proto bomb proto gun proto sword

slime slasher.name: slime slasher
slime slasher.description: a sturdy shovel modified to dole out a little extra damage to slime family monsters.

robo wrecker.name: robo wrecker
robo wrecker.description: a wrench-like tool thought to be of gremlin design. though its origin is mysterious, its ability to destroy constructs is well-documented.

argent peacemaker.name: argent peacemaker
argent peacemaker.description: an ancient handgun forged from sun silver. its bullets serve as ushers for those that refuse to leave this world.
argent peacemaker.notes: despite its description, this item doesn't use sun silver in its crafting recipe. "argent" derives from "argentum", which is the latin word for silver. (the chemical symbol for silver is still ag.) more generally, "argent" refers to any white metal. it has a related technical meaning in heraldry , which may be relevant to knights of the spiral order. "peacemaker" is another name for the colt single action army handgun popular in the american old west. history release 2011-04-04 : this item has been available since the game officially launched. release 2012-02-22 : the damage type was changed to pure elemental (from piercing+elemental) and it gained a "damage bonus vs. undead : medium" ability. release 2014-12-03 : the "damage bonus vs. undead: medium" ability was increased to "high."

blitz needle.name: blitz needle
blitz needle.description: for when suppression just isn't good enough, the blitz needle specializes in "oppressive fire".
blitz needle.notes: although the charge attack yields 15 crystals, the needle gun line of weapons seems to have only 12 crystals present on the gun.

callahan.name: callahan
callahan.description: a handgun of incredible power that can leave its target in a daze. it is said to make its targets feel far less lucky. a charged shot can even pierce through multiple enemies.
callahan.notes: the gun's name and description both reference dirty harry . in that film, clint eastwood plays police officer harry callahan. he delivers the famous line, "...you’ve got to ask yourself one question: 'do i feel lucky?' well, do ya, punk?". the gun sound comes from another three rings game, bang howdy . history release 2011-04-04 : this item has been available since the game officially launched. release 2011-08-02 : its recipe was changed in the king krogmo's coliseum update. release 2012-02-22 : its knockback was changed in the mission update.

hail driver.name: hail driver
hail driver.description: once you've seen the splitting bolts of unnaturally cold ice it produces, you'll understand why this driver is hailed.
hail driver.notes: the hail driver is part of the alchemer line. the items in this set include: hail driver magma driver nova driver storm driver umbra driver the hail driver is also part of the standards weapons that can inflict freeze . the items in this set include: shivermist buster hail driver glacius

iron slug.name: iron slug
iron slug.description: only the most frightening of foes can withstand the crippling paralysis caused by the magnum force of the iron slug's sudden impact. a charged shot can even pierce through multiple enemies.
iron slug.notes: like callahan , mega magnus , and magnus , the iron slug references dirty harry . the films magnum force and sudden impact are referenced in the item description. history release 2011-04-04 : this item has been available since the game officially launched. release 2011-08-02 : its recipe was changed in the king krogmo's coliseum update. release 2012-02-22 : its knockback was changed in the mission update. release 2014-12-03 : shortly thereafter, designer nick popovich stated that the iron slug would be improved "in an upcoming patch" which was implemented as part of the gunner update. release 2018-07-25 : stun tooltip was added. it was suppose to be added sooner in the release 2018-07-10 .

magma driver.name: magma driver
magma driver.description: spitting gobs of molten death at an alarming rate, this sublime sidearm is not recommended for use around (or on) anyone (or anything) that you happen to care deeply about.
magma driver.notes: the magma driver is part of the alchemer line. the items in this set include: hail driver magma driver nova driver storm driver umbra driver the magma driver is also part of the standards weapons that can inflict fire . the items in this set include: ash of agni magma driver combuster

nova driver.name: nova driver
nova driver.description: it'll take more than a wish to save you if you're the unfortunate target of this all-powerful pistol with the strength of the stars themselves.
nova driver.notes: the nova driver is part of the alchemer line. the items in this set include: hail driver magma driver nova driver storm driver umbra driver

sentenza.name: sentenza
sentenza.description: an ancient handgun forged from shadow steel. it is said to have been wielded by an evil one who possessed "angel eyes".
sentenza.notes: the item name and description both reference the good, the bad, and the ugly . in that film, lee van cleef plays a mercenary named angel eyes. in the original script, angel eyes was named sentenza, which is italian for "sentence" or "judgment". history release 2011-04-04 : this item has been available since the game officially launched. release 2012-02-22 : like blackhawk , it was significantly changed, its damage type was changed from a mixture of piercing and shadow, to pure shadow. also, it gained its gremlin bonus. release 2013-07-30 : this item recipe was changed. release 2014-12-03 : the gremlin damage bonus was increased from medium to high.

storm driver.name: storm driver
storm driver.description: the latent charge running through this supreme sidearm is strong enough to cause discomfort to anyone wielding it, and extreme discomfort to anyone shot by it.
storm driver.notes: the storm driver is part of the alchemer line. the items in this set include: hail driver magma driver nova driver storm driver umbra driver the storm driver is also part of the standards weapons that can inflict shock . the items in this set include: voltaic tempest storm driver voltedge

umbra driver.name: umbra driver
umbra driver.description: this horrifyingly powerful handgun fires bullets that are completely devoid of color, odor and mercy.
umbra driver.notes: the umbra driver is part of the alchemer line. the items in this set include: hail driver magma driver nova driver storm driver umbra driver

valiance.name: valiance
valiance.description: this high-performance handgun is a symbol of the spiral order, and is proudly worn by veteran members. as it is often said, a knight need not have courage: just valiance.
valiance.notes: underneath the muzzle of the hand gun has a blade underneath that resembles a small version of the leviathan blade but with no hilt. the valiance is part of the standard spiral order set. the items in this set include: azure guardian helm azure guardian armor aegis nitronome valiance leviathan blade

volcanic pepperbox.name: volcanic pepperbox
volcanic pepperbox.description: when encamped in dangerous territory, the volcanic pepperbox is perfect for roasting both marshmallows and enemies.
volcanic pepperbox.notes: damage was increased and fire was added to the regular attacks with release 2014-12-03 .

biohazard.name: biohazard
biohazard.description: be sure to check your armor's seals thoroughly before engaging in the operation of this weapon, or you may end up as miserable as your foes. biohazard bullets envelop the enemy in an energy field that explodes after taking damage.
biohazard.notes: previously, this weapon would produce the circling orbs with the charge attack, which were then able to be detonated with the regular attack. this was reversed with release 2014-12-03 .

neutralizer.name: neutralizer
neutralizer.description: you'd be surprised at the number of practical applications to be had from two substances that, when combined, leave literally quite nothing in their wake. neutralizer bullets envelop the enemy in an energy field that explodes after taking damage.
neutralizer.notes: the explosion damage was originally lower than biohazard 's, but was increased with release 2025-10-07 .

polaris.name: polaris
polaris.description: it's said that the explosions caused by this stellar sidearm are so bright you'll always be able to find your way in the darkness. polaris shots become more powerful the further they travel.
polaris.notes: the name polaris and the weapon's description are references to the star polaris , commonly known as the north star. due to its proximity to the northern celestial pole and its almost motionlessness in the night sky, polaris is used as navigational star.

supernova.name: supernova
supernova.description: the destruction left in the wake of this peerless pistol is anything but nebulous. supernova shots become more powerful the further they travel.

plague needle.name: plague needle
plague needle.description: knights are divided on whether this gun's bolts pierce and then poison, or poison then pierce. to the unlucky target the distinction is irrelevant.
plague needle.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched. damage and poison chance was increased with release 2014-12-03 .

obsidian carbine.name: obsidian carbine
obsidian carbine.description: a deadly gun made from the obsidian obelisks found within the realm of the apocrea. with every shot fired, a faint whisper is heard, believed to be the true name of its target.
obsidian carbine.notes: the obsidian carbine is part of the shroud of the apocrea gear. the items in this set include: obsidian crusher obsidian carbine obsidian edge obsidian obstacle

gorgofist.name: gorgofist
gorgofist.description: a terrifying handgun that combines the dual-crushing power of a gorgo and the mythical tortomega. suppressing enemies has never been more fiendishly fun.
gorgofist.notes: this item was introduced during the second march of the tortodrones event the 2014.190 16 july 2014 . the charge attack (depending on the gun's damage type of course) is effective against mecha knight and almirian crusader monsters. these enemies are highly likely to be struck by the barrage when it actually hits because their shields decay by the time the crystals land. the gorgofist is part of the march of the tortodrones gear. the items in this set include: gorgomega gorgofist

grand tortofist.name: grand tortofist
grand tortofist.description: a handgun empowered by the limitless fury of a tortodrone. while wielding it you can feel the berserk energy within eager to be unleashed.
grand tortofist.notes: this item was introduced during the second march of the tortodrones event the 2014.190 16 july 2014 . the charge attack (depending on the gun's damage type of course) is effective against mecha knight and almirian crusader monsters. these enemies are highly likely to be struck by the barrage when it actually hits because their shields decay by the time the crystals land. the grand tortofist is part of the march of the tortodrones gear. the items in this set include: grand tortoise grand tortofist

omega tortofist.name: omega tortofist
omega tortofist.description: a handgun empowered by the limitless fury of a tortodrone. while wielding it you are capable of unleashing the energy of a legion of tortodrones upon your foes.
omega tortofist.notes: this item was introduced during the second march of the tortodrones event the 2014.190 16 july 2014 . the charge attack (depending on the gun's damage type of course) is effective against mecha knight and almirian crusader monsters. these enemies are highly likely to be struck by the barrage when it actually hits because their shields decay by the time the crystals land. the omega tortofist is part of the march of the tortodrones gear. the items in this set include: omegaward omega tortofist

savage tortofist.name: savage tortofist
savage tortofist.description: a handgun alchemized from a hardened tortodrone shell. while wielding it you can feel the primal energy of a rampaging wolver pack within waiting to be unleashed.
savage tortofist.notes: this item was introduced during the second march of the tortodrones event the 2014.190 16 july 2014 . the charge attack (depending on the gun's damage type of course) is effective against mecha knight and almirian crusader monsters. these enemies are highly likely to be struck by the barrage when it actually hits because their shields decay by the time the crystals land. the savage tortofist is part of the march of the tortodrones gear. the items in this set include: savage tortoise savage tortofist

overcharged mixmaster.name: overcharged mixmaster

prize_box_names: randomly from a confection prize box

overcharged mixmaster.description: an industrial strength handheld mixer that is sure to stir things up.
overcharged mixmaster.notes: the overcharged mixmaster was introduced during the confection prize box promotion in august 2014. for a short time after its release, this handgun dealt normal damage. this was promptly fixed to deal elemental damage with the release 2014-08-29 . it is part of a group of "culinary" items, which include a variety of combat gear as well as aesthetic pieces from different parts of the game. view full list here .

arcana.name: arcana
arcana.description: an exceptional handgun that fires powerful, elemental shots that many spiral knights refer to as 'magic missiles'.
arcana.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-12-03 . the word "arcana" is spanish and italian for "arcane" which means " known or knowable only to a few people ", " secret ", " mysterious ", " magical ". maybe referring to how hahn explains what elemental damage its to the player in the 4-3 mission: elemental my dear .

gilded griffin.name: gilded griffin
gilded griffin.description: a beautiful pistol named after a great, noble beast. its golden frame was believed to provide light within the impenetrable darkness of the underworld.
gilded griffin.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-12-03 .

grim repeater.name: grim repeater
grim repeater.description: used only by the most elite of the spiral knight rangers, this devilish machine gun earned its name from the incredible speed in which it hands out shadowy tickets to the afterlife.
grim repeater.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-12-03 .

permafroster.name: permafroster
permafroster.description: tech knights are not yet sure if targets of this deep-freezing handgun ever actually defrost. so far, 'no.' permafroster shots become more powerful the further they travel.
permafroster.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-12-03 .

phantamos.name: phantamos
phantamos.description: a powerful handgun brimming with dark energy. the phantamos represents one of the most recent additions to the spiral knight's arsenal, as containing shadow energy of this degree took a great deal of research.
phantamos.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-12-03 .

riftlocker.name: riftlocker
riftlocker.description: a deadly handgun said to be capable of sundering heavy armor with a single shot. these firearms proved instrumental during the siege of isora in breaking through the war machines of the morai.
riftlocker.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-12-03 .

wildfire.name: wildfire
wildfire.description: an elite handgun that can offer a tremendous surprise for the enemy on the battlefield as its small charges of energy transform into raging wildfires. wildfire shots become more powerful the further they travel.
wildfire.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-12-03 .

winter grave.name: winter grave
winter grave.description: a tremendously powerful hand cannon whose moniker should come as no surprise to anyone who happens to be viewing it from the wrong end. a charged shot can even plow through multiple enemies.
winter grave.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-12-03 .

celestial orbitgun.name: celestial orbitgun

prize_box_names: randomly from a equinox prize box

celestial orbitgun.description: this planetoid projecting pistol conjures images of the birth of stellar systems. opponents caught within its blazing maelstrom are sure to see the light.
celestial orbitgun.notes: the celestial orbitgun was introduced 2016.070 16 march 2016 during the equinox prize box promotion march 2016 . the celestial orbitgun is part of the equinox set. the items in this set include: celestial shield celestial saber celestial vortex celestial orbitgun

owlite wand.name: owlite wand
owlite wand.description: they say the wand chooses the wizard, so don't let this one see your cute friend.
owlite wand.notes: the owlite wand was introduced during the owlite archaeology prize box promotion in january 2019. "the wand chooses the wizard" is a quote from the harry potter series. for a short time, the owlite wand was unaffected by handgun bonuses despite being categorized as a handgun. moreover, the basic attacks rooted players in place, and it had a different sound effect. these issues were fixed on 1 february 2019 .

blackhawk.name: blackhawk
blackhawk.description: a shadow-aligned handgun of incredible power, it's said to contain the soul of a knight who was only two days from retirement.
blackhawk.notes: although the name " blackhawk " refers to many things, the most probable allusion here is to the ruger blackhawk revolver. the item description employs the retirony trope, that appears in countless films, television shows, etc. history release 2011-04-04 : this item has been available since the game officially launched. release 2012-02-22 : like sentenza , it was significantly changed, its damage type was changed from a mixture of piercing and shadow, to pure shadow. also, it gained its gremlin bonus. release 2013-07-30 : this item recipe was changed. release 2014-12-03 : the gremlin damage bonus was increased from low to high.

cryo driver.name: cryo driver
cryo driver.description: a high-tech alchemical sidearm that fires powerful cryo bullets that split multiple times on impact.

fiery pepperbox.name: fiery pepperbox
fiery pepperbox.description: when you've been attacked by a swarm of ice cubes, all knights agree: happiness is a fiery pepperbox.
fiery pepperbox.notes: this item damage was increased with release 2014-12-03 . a pepperbox is a general term for handguns with three or more barrels.

firo driver.name: firo driver
firo driver.description: a high-tech alchemical sidearm that fires powerful firo bullets that split multiple times on impact.

master blaster.name: master blaster
master blaster.description: this advanced sidearm is an excellent choice if your adventuring party happens to need another hero.

mega magnus.name: mega magnus
mega magnus.description: an upgraded magnus powerful enough to take a monster's head clean off. a charged shot can even pierce through multiple enemies.
mega magnus.notes: like callahan and iron slug , mega magnus and magnus references dirty harry . in that film, clint eastwood's character famously describes his gun, "...being this is a .44 magnum, the most powerful handgun in the world, and would blow your head clean off...." history release 2011-04-04 : this item has been available since the game officially launched. release 2011-08-02 : its recipe was changed in the king krogmo's coliseum update. release 2012-02-22 : its knockback was changed in the mission update.

prisma driver.name: prisma driver
prisma driver.description: a high tech alchemical sidearm that fires powerful prisma bullets that split multiple times on impact.

shadow driver.name: shadow driver
shadow driver.description: a high-tech alchemical sidearm that fires powerful shadow bullets that split multiple times on impact.

silversix.name: silversix
silversix.description: a mysterious antique with a brilliant silver finish, these handguns are said to have been wielded by 'gunslinger priests' during a now forgotten time.
silversix.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched. the undead damage bonus was increased from low to high with release 2014-12-03

strike needle.name: strike needle
strike needle.description: plans to modify the strike needle for non-combat usage were shelved after a recruit accidentally riddled lieutenant feron's bunk with holes.

volt driver.name: volt driver
volt driver.description: a high-tech alchemical sidearm that fires powerful volt bullets that split multiple times on impact.

virulent catalyzer.name: virulent catalyzer
virulent catalyzer.description: the incorporation of spiral technology has given this harrowing handgun a powerfully poisonous payload. catalyzer bullets envelop the enemy in an energy field that explodes after taking damage.
virulent catalyzer.notes: previously, this weapon would produce the circling orbs with the charge attack, which were then able to be detonated with the regular attack. this was reversed with release 2014-12-03 .

volatile catalyzer.name: volatile catalyzer
volatile catalyzer.description: removing the safety overrides from a piece of gremlin technology is a good way to lose a limb. in this case, it probably won't be one of yours. catalyzer bullets envelop the enemy in an energy field that explodes after taking damage.
volatile catalyzer.notes: the explosion damage was originally lower than virulent catalyzer 's, but was increased with release 2025-10-07 .

gigawatt pulsar.name: gigawatt pulsar
gigawatt pulsar.description: a powerfully enhanced handgun that hits foes with the force of a lightning bolt. pulsar shots become more powerful the further they travel.

radiant pulsar.name: radiant pulsar
radiant pulsar.description: a cutting-edge handgun intended for use only by the spiral order's best and brightest. pulsar shots become more powerful the further they travel.

blight needle.name: blight needle
blight needle.description: it's a proven fact that even the most virulent of toxins is a lot more contagious if it's fired indiscriminately over a large area.

barrier cannon.name: barrier cannon
barrier cannon.description: a handgun alchemized from the shell of a tortodrone. the elemental offense of a tortodrone on the long migration should aid you on your own expeditions.
barrier cannon.notes: this item was introduced during the second march of the tortodrones event the 2014.190 16 july 2014 . the charge attack (depending on the gun's damage type of course) is effective against mecha knight and almirian crusader monsters. these enemies are highly likely to be struck by the barrage when it actually hits because their shields decay by the time the crystals land. the barrier cannon is part of the march of the tortodrones gear. the items in this set include: barrier shell barrier cannon

feral cannon.name: feral cannon
feral cannon.description: a handgun alchemized from the shell of a hardened tortodrone shell. while wielding it, you can feel the penetrating energies within just waiting to be unleashed.
feral cannon.notes: this item was introduced during the second march of the tortodrones event the 2014.190 16 july 2014 . the charge attack (depending on the gun's damage type of course) is effective against mecha knight and almirian crusader monsters. these enemies are highly likely to be struck by the barrage when it actually hits because their shields decay by the time the crystals land. the feral cannon is part of the march of the tortodrones gear. the items in this set include: feral shell feral cannon

mighty cannon.name: mighty cannon
mighty cannon.description: a handgun alchemized from the shell of a tortodrone. while wielding it, you can feel the unstable energies within just waiting to be unleashed
mighty cannon.notes: this item was introduced during the second march of the tortodrones event the 2014.190 16 july 2014 . the charge attack (depending on the gun's damage type of course) is effective against mecha knight and almirian crusader monsters. these enemies are highly likely to be struck by the barrage when it actually hits because their shields decay by the time the crystals land. the mighty cannon is part of the march of the tortodrones gear. the items in this set include: mighty shell mighty cannon

nether cannon.name: nether cannon
nether cannon.description: a handgun alchemized from the shell of a corrupted tortodrone. a tormented howl of rage can be heard on the wind when it is unleashed upon your foes.
nether cannon.notes: this item was introduced during the second march of the tortodrones event the 2014.190 16 july 2014 . the charge attack (depending on the gun's damage type of course) is effective against mecha knight and almirian crusader monsters. these enemies are highly likely to be struck by the barrage when it actually hits because their shields decay by the time the crystals land. the nether cannon is part of the march of the tortodrones gear. the items in this set include: nether shell nether cannon

black chaingun.name: black chaingun
black chaingun.description: a highly advanced machine gun designed to output hundreds of rounds of shadow bolts in a very short time. controlling one of these requires skilled hands.
black chaingun.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-12-03 .

blazing pulsar.name: blazing pulsar
blazing pulsar.description: a highly advanced pulsar capable of launching compact infernos from afar. pulsar shots become more powerful the further they travel.
blazing pulsar.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-12-03 .

breach blaster.name: breach blaster
breach blaster.description: an enhanced pierce blaster designed to break through hostile armor.
breach blaster.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-12-03 .

frozen pulsar.name: frozen pulsar
frozen pulsar.description: a highly advanced pulsar that can produce a blizzard-like blast of ice once its rounds mature. pulsar shots become more powerful the further they travel.
frozen pulsar.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-12-03 .

fusion blaster.name: fusion blaster
fusion blaster.description: an enhanced elemental blaster designed to banish creatures that lurk in the shadows.
fusion blaster.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-12-03 .

mega tundrus.name: mega tundrus
mega tundrus.description: an upgraded tundrus that takes no prisoners, except when it does and then the prison is made of ice. a charged shot can even plow through multiple enemies.
mega tundrus.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-12-03 .

raptor.name: raptor
raptor.description: an ancient pistol imbued with enchantments designed to smite the fiendish creatures of the underworld. like its namesake, its bullets fly fast and strike with deadly force.
raptor.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-12-03 .

umbral blaster.name: umbral blaster
umbral blaster.description: an enhanced shadow blaster designed to neutralize alien bioforms.
umbral blaster.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-12-03 .

antigua.name: antigua
antigua.description: a mysterious relic from a forgotten time. it uses explosive powder to fire its rounds.
antigua.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched. antigua is a caribbean island that appears in pirate stories. "antigua" also means "ancient" in spanish.

cryotech alchemer mk ii.name: cryotech alchemer mk ii
cryotech alchemer mk ii.description: an upgraded alchemer that fires bolts of extremely low temperature material at an increased rate.

firotech alchemer mk ii.name: firotech alchemer mk ii
firotech alchemer mk ii.description: an upgraded alchemer that fires bolts of napalm at an increased rate.

magnus.name: magnus
magnus.description: a large handgun with hard hitting rounds that can leave even the strongest of monsters dazed. a charged shot can even pierce through multiple enemies.
magnus.notes: like callahan and iron slug , mega magnus and magnus references dirty harry . in that film, clint eastwood's character famously describes his gun, "...being this is a .44 magnum, the most powerful handgun in the world, and would blow your head clean off...." history release 2011-04-04 : this item has been available since the game officially launched. release 2011-08-02 : its recipe was changed in the king krogmo's coliseum update. release 2012-02-22 : its knockback was changed in the mission update.

needle shot.name: needle shot
needle shot.description: an autogun modified to fire piercing bolts at an alarming rate.

pepperbox.name: pepperbox
pepperbox.description: an autogun modified to fire high-temperature bullets capable of engulfing foes.
pepperbox.notes: a pepperbox is a general term for handguns with three or more barrels.

prismatech alchemer mk ii.name: prismatech alchemer mk ii
prismatech alchemer mk ii.description: an upgraded alchemer that fires bolts of photonic liquid at an increased rate.

shadowtech alchemer mk ii.name: shadowtech alchemer mk ii
shadowtech alchemer mk ii.description: an upgraded alchemer that fires bolts of shadow at an increased rate.

super blaster.name: super blaster
super blaster.description: a supercharged blaster well-suited to longer expeditions down into the clockworks.

voltech alchemer mk ii.name: voltech alchemer mk ii
voltech alchemer mk ii.description: an upgraded alchemer that fires bolts of electricity at an increased rate.

industrial catalyzer.name: industrial catalyzer
industrial catalyzer.description: a catalyzer modified to fire dangerously supercharged projectiles. catalyzer bullets envelop the enemy in an energy field that explodes after taking damage.
industrial catalyzer.notes: previously, this weapon would produce the circling orbs with the charge attack, which were then able to be detonated with the regular attack. this was reversed with release 2014-12-03 . the explosion damage was originally lower than toxic catalyzer 's, but was increased with release 2025-10-07 .

toxic catalyzer.name: toxic catalyzer
toxic catalyzer.description: a catalyzer modified to fire dangerously radioactive projectiles. catalyzer bullets envelop the enemy in an energy field that explodes after taking damage.
toxic catalyzer.notes: previously, this weapon would produce the circling orbs with the charge attack, which were then able to be detonated with the regular attack. this was reversed with release 2014-12-03 .

heavy pulsar.name: heavy pulsar
heavy pulsar.description: a pulsar upgraded with spiral technology to pack a greater punch. pulsar shots become more powerful the further they travel.

kilowatt pulsar.name: kilowatt pulsar
kilowatt pulsar.description: a pulsar upgraded with spiral technology to deliver an unpleasant shock on impact. pulsar shots become more powerful the further they travel.

toxic needle.name: toxic needle
toxic needle.description: an autogun modified to fire piercing bolts dosed with a wicked poison.

grim buster.name: grim buster
grim buster.description: a handgun alchemized from the shell of a corrupted tortodrone. shadows seem to seep from the barrel whenever it is brought to bear.
grim buster.notes: this item was introduced during the second march of the tortodrones event the 2014.190 16 july 2014 . the charge attack (depending on the gun's damage type of course) is effective against mecha knight and almirian crusader monsters. these enemies are highly likely to be struck by the barrage when it actually hits because their shields decay by the time the crystals land. the grim buster is part of the march of the tortodrones gear. the items in this set include: grim shell grim buster

primal buster.name: primal buster
primal buster.description: a handgun alchemized from the shell of a tortodrone. while wielding it you can sense the natural energy within waiting to be unleashed.
primal buster.notes: this item was introduced during the second march of the tortodrones event the 2014.190 16 july 2014 . the charge attack (depending on the gun's damage type of course) is effective against mecha knight and almirian crusader monsters. these enemies are highly likely to be struck by the barrage when it actually hits because their shields decay by the time the crystals land. the primal buster is part of the march of the tortodrones gear. the items in this set include: primal shell primal buster

stoic buster.name: stoic buster
stoic buster.description: a handgun alchemized from the shell of a tortodrone. while wielding it, you sense the quiet passing of the wind and can call upon the rumbling storm that follows.
stoic buster.notes: this item was introduced during the second march of the tortodrones event the 2014.190 16 july 2014 . the charge attack (depending on the gun's damage type of course) is effective against mecha knight and almirian crusader monsters. these enemies are highly likely to be struck by the barrage when it actually hits because their shields decay by the time the crystals land. the stoic buster is part of the march of the tortodrones gear. the items in this set include: stoic shell stoic buster

wild buster.name: wild buster
wild buster.description: a handgun alchemized from the shell of a hardened tortodrone shell. while wielding it, you can feel the fierce energies within just waiting to be unleashed.
wild buster.notes: this item was introduced during the second march of the tortodrones event the 2014.190 16 july 2014 . the charge attack (depending on the gun's damage type of course) is effective against mecha knight and almirian crusader monsters. these enemies are highly likely to be struck by the barrage when it actually hits because their shields decay by the time the crystals land. the wild buster is part of the march of the tortodrones gear. the items in this set include: wild shell wild buster

dark chaingun.name: dark chaingun
dark chaingun.description: a machine gun capable of firing a barrage of searing, shadow bolts.
dark chaingun.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-12-03 .

elemental blaster.name: elemental blaster
elemental blaster.description: an enhanced blaster modified to fire elemental rounds.
elemental blaster.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-12-03 .

flaming pulsar.name: flaming pulsar
flaming pulsar.description: a pulsar upgraded with a scorching energy that burns greater over time. pulsar shots become more powerful the further they travel.
flaming pulsar.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-12-03 .

freezing pulsar.name: freezing pulsar
freezing pulsar.description: a pulsar modified with a freezing agent that grows colder over time. pulsar shots become more powerful the further they travel.
freezing pulsar.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-12-03 .

pierce blaster.name: pierce blaster
pierce blaster.description: an enhanced blaster modified to fire piercing rounds.
pierce blaster.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-12-03 .

shadow blaster.name: shadow blaster
shadow blaster.description: an enhanced blaster modified to fire shadow rounds.
shadow blaster.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-12-03 .

tundrus.name: tundrus
tundrus.description: a modified magnus that ensures that if somehow your target survived the first shot, they will still be frozen in their tracks. a charged shot can even plow through multiple enemies.
tundrus.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-12-03 .

blaster.name: blaster
blaster.description: a versatile handgun issued to spiral knights who have proven themselves in the field.

cryotech alchemer.name: cryotech alchemer
cryotech alchemer.description: an alchemical handgun that fires hyper low temperature bullets that split on impact.

firotech alchemer.name: firotech alchemer
firotech alchemer.description: an alchemical handgun that fires bullets of liquid flames that split on impact.

autogun.name: autogun
autogun.description: a fully automated handgun capable of rapidly firing powerful bolts of energy.
autogun.notes: the autogun, as well as the rest of the pepperbox line, appear to be modeled after a toy gun, more specifically the nerf maverick .

prismatech alchemer.name: prismatech alchemer
prismatech alchemer.description: an alchemical handgun that fires bullets of photon-charged liquid that split on impact.

shadowtech alchemer.name: shadowtech alchemer
shadowtech alchemer.description: an alchemical handgun that fires bullets of concentrated shadow that split on impact.

voltech alchemer.name: voltech alchemer
voltech alchemer.description: an alchemical handgun that fires highly charged ionic bullets that split on impact.

catalyzer.name: catalyzer
catalyzer.description: an advanced alchemical armament adapted from gremlin mining and demolition devices. catalyzer bullets envelop the enemy in an energy field that explodes after taking damage.
catalyzer.notes: previously, this weapon would produce the circling orbs with the charge attack, which were then able to be detonated with the regular attack. this was reversed with release 2014-12-03 . the explosion damage was increased with release 2025-10-07 .

pulsar.name: pulsar
pulsar.description: a high-tech gremlin firearm originally designed for use by elite squads of ironclaw soldiers. pulsar shots become more powerful the further they travel.

frost gun.name: frost gun
frost gun.description: a modified proto gun augmented with a low intensity, alchemical freezing agent.

pummel gun.name: pummel gun
pummel gun.description: a punch gun properly modified for combat use. the recoil from its powerful charge attack is notorious amongst recruits.

super stun gun.name: super stun gun
super stun gun.description: an upgraded stun gun whose powerful blast will discourage even the most disconcerting of clockworks monsters.

zapper.name: zapper
zapper.description: a modified proto gun augmented with a low intensity electrical charge.

spitfire.name: spitfire
spitfire.description: a modified proto gun augmented with a low intensity burst of flame.
spitfire.notes: the spitfire is part of the aeria games line. the items in this bundle include: ignition helm ignition armor emberbreak shield firecracker spitfire hot edge

chilling duelist.name: chilling duelist
chilling duelist.description: start settling disputes at the crack of dawn with this cold, custom handgun.
chilling duelist.notes: this item has been available since release 2014-01-01 in the deluxe starter pack. the design and function is similar to the antigua , with fast shots and a large clip, but shifted into a lower star tier. this weapon also can cause freeze with all its shots, including the charge shots. the chilling duelist is part of the deluxe starter pack. the items in this pack include: tri-guard helm tri-guard armor green ward static flash chilling duelist red saber

punch gun.name: punch gun
punch gun.description: used to blast open damaged drop pods, this emergency rescue tool doubles nicely as a powerful, single shot handgun.

stun gun.name: stun gun
stun gun.description: a proto gun modified to stun monsters. stunned monsters move and attack slower than normal.

proto gun.name: proto gun
proto gun.description: a compact firearm issued to all spiral knight recruits.
proto gun.notes: proto guns were once available for purchase from quince , however this character was removed from the game. the proto gun is part of the proto line. the items in this set include: proto shield proto bomb proto gun proto sword

ash of agni.name: ash of agni
ash of agni.description: once this bomb has left the battlefield in ashes, then, and only then, will your enemies have your permission to die.
ash of agni.notes: agni is the hindu god of fire. the bomb's description may refer to the 2012 film the dark knight rises . in the film, bane tells batman, "once gotham is in ruins, then you have my permission to die". the phrase became well known as an internet meme. the ash of agni is part of the standards weapons that can inflict fire . the items in this set include: ash of agni magma driver combuster history release 2011-04-04 : this item has been available since official launch. release 2011-07-06 : the cloud radius has been slightly reduced. release 2011-08-02 : the alchemy path of 'vaporizer bombs' no longer requires the haze bomb . release 2012-05-09 : all bombs have had their damage increased by 15%. release 2013-07-30 : the recipe of the ash of agni has been changed.

big angry bomb.name: big angry bomb
big angry bomb.description: an immensely powerful bomb with a terrible attitude.
big angry bomb.notes: this bomb has the biggest knockback in the game. history release 2011-04-04 : this item has been available since official launch. release 2012-05-09 : all bombs have had their damage increased by 15%. release 2012-08-08 : the blast radius was increased and a chance to inflict stun was added.

graviton vortex.name: graviton vortex
graviton vortex.description: a graviton bomb fortified with potentially dangerous amounts of shadow steel. its blast should draw your foes toward it... if it doesn't rip the entire universe in two, that is.
graviton vortex.notes: history release 2011-04-04 : this item has been available since official launch. release 2011-06-09 : the alchemy path has been changed. the preceding graviton bomb now requires the super blast bomb . release 2011-08-02 : the alchemy path has been changed again. the preceding graviton bomb now requires the graviton charge . release 2012-05-09 : all bombs have had their damage increased by 15%. release 2013-07-30 : the recipe of the graviton vortex has been changed.

irontech destroyer.name: irontech destroyer
irontech destroyer.description: the big brother of the irontech bomb, the destroyer unleashes the full potential of irontech power.
irontech destroyer.notes: history release 2011-04-04 : this item has been available since official launch. release 2012-05-09 : all bombs have had their damage increased by 15%. release 2012-08-08 : the blast radius was increased and a chance to inflict stun was added.

nitronome.name: nitronome
nitronome.description: an advanced explosive issued to only the most elite spiral knight grenadiers. it's made from a synthetic substance that ticks ominously even when unarmed.
nitronome.notes: this is the fastest charging bomb in the game. the nitronome is part of the standard spiral order set. the items in this set include: azure guardian helm azure guardian armor aegis nitronome valiance leviathan blade history release 2011-04-04 : this item has been available since official launch. release 2012-05-09 : all bombs have had their damage increased by 15%.

shivermist buster.name: shivermist buster
shivermist buster.description: a powerful alchemical bomb that produces a cloud of ultra low temperature mist. the cloud it generates can freeze monsters in their tracks.
