shivermist buster.notes: the shivermist buster is part of the standards weapons that can inflict freeze . the items in this set include: shivermist buster hail driver glacius history release 2011-04-04 : this item has been available since official launch. release 2011-07-06 : the cloud radius has been slightly reduced. release 2011-08-02 : the alchemy path of 'vaporizer bombs' no longer requires the haze bomb . release 2012-05-09 : all bombs have had their damage increased by 15%. release 2013-07-30 : the recipe of the shivermist buster has been changed.

torpor tantrum.name: torpor tantrum
torpor tantrum.description: the ultimate sleep bomb. it's like a bedtime story, only more explodey.
torpor tantrum.notes: this item has been available since release 2017-05-11 .

venom veiler.name: venom veiler
venom veiler.description: the ultimate in toxic dispersal devices, the venom veiler can be used to destroy pests on crops. failing that, it can also be used to destroy crops.
venom veiler.notes: history release 2011-04-04 : this item has been available since official launch. release 2011-07-06 : the cloud radius has been slightly reduced. release 2011-08-02 : the alchemy path of 'vaporizer bombs' no longer requires the haze bomb . release 2012-05-09 : all bombs have had their damage increased by 15%. release 2013-07-30 : the recipe of the venom veiler has been changed.

dark briar barrage.name: dark briar barrage
dark briar barrage.description: a mythical object that can explode with the fury of the snarbolax itself. the unearthly howl it produces is said to be more crippling than its blast.
dark briar barrage.notes: the dark briar barrage is part of the frumious fang token reward line. the items in this set include: snarbolax cap snarbolax coat barbarous thorn shield dark briar barrage barbarous thorn blade history release 2011-06-02 : this item has been introduced to the game. release 2012-05-09 : all bombs have had their damage increased by 15%. the fuse time of the dark briar barrage was decreased. release 2013-07-30 : the recipe of the dark briar barrage has been changed.

voltaic tempest.name: voltaic tempest
voltaic tempest.description: this high-tech, high voltage device is not recommended for use in water, around water, or near people thinking about water. to be safe, you probably shouldn't look at it either.
voltaic tempest.notes: the voltaic tempest is part of the standards weapons that can inflict shock . the items in this set include: voltaic tempest storm driver voltedge history release 2011-07-06 : this item has been introduced to the game. release 2012-05-09 : all bombs have had their damage increased by 15%. release 2013-07-30 : the recipe of the voltaic tempest has been changed.

electron vortex.name: electron vortex
electron vortex.description: an electron bomb modified with a payload of unstable organic essence. foes caught in its punishing radius are cruelly referred to as "thunderstuck".
electron vortex.notes: the shock can stop monsters from being scattered out of the bomb's range. history release 2011-08-02 : this item has been introduced to the game. release 2012-05-09 : all bombs have had their damage increased by 15%. release 2013-07-30 : the recipe of the electron vortex has been changed. release 2013-10-23 : fix to electron line of bombs not having shock status listed in their tooltips.

stagger storm.name: stagger storm
stagger storm.description: though it was originally developed by the spiral order to harmlessly subdue dangerous species, how you deal with foes unfortunate enough to be caught in the storm is entirely up to you.
stagger storm.notes: history release 2011-08-02 : this item has been introduced to the game. release 2012-05-09 : all bombs have had their damage increased by 15%. release 2013-07-30 : the recipe of the stagger storm has been changed.

dark retribution.name: dark retribution
dark retribution.description: the perfected version of the shadowy bomb that warmaster seerus engineered with the sole purpose of eliminating other gremlins that stood in his way. it is thought to have been reserved for use against other members of the crimson order.
dark retribution.notes: royal mini jellies, battlepods and possibly mini ice jellies are not effected by the orbs, but are damaged by the initial blast of the bomb. mini green jellies are hit by the orbs. the dark retribution is part of the tier 3 operation crimson hammer gear. the items in this collection include: perfect mask of seerus dark retribution warmaster rocket hammer history release 2012-02-29 : this item has been introduced to the game. release 2012-03-07 : the dark retribution has received a damage decrease and a speed reduction to the orbiting bullets. release 2012-05-09 : all bombs have had their damage increased by 15%.

deadly crystal bomb.name: deadly crystal bomb
deadly crystal bomb.description: a large chunk of moonstone and valestone alloy primed with a potent explosive. studies have shown that this bomb can be used to reduce a zombie's craving for brains by up to 100% by blowing them to pieces.
deadly crystal bomb.notes: history release 2012-08-08 : this item has been introduced to the game. release 2013-07-30 : the recipe of the deadly crystal bomb has been changed.

deadly dark matter bomb.name: deadly dark matter bomb
deadly dark matter bomb.description: a large chunk of dark matter primed with a potent explosive. this bomb would be in stark violation of the spiral order's safety handbook if they hadn't lost the last copy in the crash.
deadly dark matter bomb.notes: history release 2012-08-08 : this item has been introduced to the game. release 2013-07-30 : the recipe of the deadly dark matter bomb has been changed.

deadly shard bomb.name: deadly shard bomb
deadly shard bomb.description: a large chunk of crimsonite primed with a potent explosive. no more depleted crimsonite here: this bomb's made with the good stuff! or the bad stuff, if you happen to be the target.

deadly splinter bomb.name: deadly splinter bomb
deadly splinter bomb.description: a large chunk of synthetic mineral primed with a potent explosive. fact: the easiest way to find the splinter in the haystack is to blow up the haystack.
deadly splinter bomb.notes: history release 2012-08-08 : this item has been introduced to the game. release 2013-07-30 : the recipe of the deadly splinter bomb has been changed.

scintillating sun shards.name: scintillating sun shards
scintillating sun shards.description: a large chunk of solar-charged luminite primed with a potent explosive. the pyrotechnic show upon detonation is positively stunning.

shocking salt bomb.name: shocking salt bomb
shocking salt bomb.description: a large chunk of rock salt primed with a potent explosive. for nutritional purposes, this particular chunk of salt has been enriched with dangerous amounts of electricity. wait, what?
shocking salt bomb.notes: this bomb produces very bright explosions. history release 2012-08-08 : this item was introduced to the game. release 2013-07-30 : its recipe was changed.

obsidian crusher.name: obsidian crusher
obsidian crusher.description: a peculiar bomb made from the obsidian obelisks found within the realm of the apocrea. despite it being a bomb, some are drawn to holding it and 'solving' it as if it were some kind of puzzle.
obsidian crusher.notes: the obsidian crusher is part of the shroud of the apocrea gear. the items in this set include: obsidian crusher obsidian carbine obsidian edge obsidian obstacle

celestial vortex.name: celestial vortex

prize_box_names: randomly from an equinox prize box

celestial vortex.description: a celestial bomb modified with a payload of a dying sun. foes caught in its fiery blast radius are shown a glimpse of the dawn of creation.
celestial vortex.notes: this item was introduced 2015.27 16 september 2015 during the equinox prize box promotion september 2015 . the celestial vortex is part of the equinox set. the items in this set include: celestial shield celestial saber celestial vortex celestial orbitgun

fiery atomizer.name: fiery atomizer
fiery atomizer.description: a powerful alchemical bomb that creates a cloud of highly combustible, searing dust.

freezing atomizer.name: freezing atomizer
freezing atomizer.description: an alchemical bomb that produces a cloud of ultra low temperature mist.

graviton bomb.name: graviton bomb
graviton bomb.description: capable of dragging enemies toward its location before exploding, this bomb utilizes technology that the spiral order does not fully understand.

heavy deconstructor.name: heavy deconstructor
heavy deconstructor.description: an upgraded deconstructor that will wreck robots and crush constructs in a wider area.

irontech bomb.name: irontech bomb
irontech bomb.description: a heavy bomb wrapped in thick iron plates. though it is slower than most bombs it packs a powerful punch.

master blast bomb.name: master blast bomb
master blast bomb.description: an incredibly powerful explosive typically used in mining, now issued somewhat recklessly for use in combat.

slumber squall.name: slumber squall
slumber squall.description: a powerful alchemical bomb that creates a thick fog of sleepy mist.
slumber squall.notes: this item has been available since release 2017-05-11 .

toxic atomizer.name: toxic atomizer
toxic atomizer.description: a powerful alchemical bomb that produces a choking poisonous cloud.

spike shower.name: spike shower
spike shower.description: a powerful device designed to shred opponents with a snarl.
spike shower.notes: the spike shower is part of the frumious fang token reward line. the items in this set include: dark thorn shield spike shower dark thorn blade

plasma capacitor.name: plasma capacitor
plasma capacitor.description: the addition of an advanced spiral power source gives this bomb a shockingly large blast radius.

electron bomb.name: electron bomb
electron bomb.description: adapted from several unconventional gremlin theories on physics, anyone unlucky enough to be dragged into this bomb's blast is in for a shock.

haze burst.name: haze burst
haze burst.description: a powerful alchemical bomb that produces a dense cloud of intensely disorienting material.

heavy crystal bomb.name: heavy crystal bomb
heavy crystal bomb.description: a solid chunk of alloy with an explosive surprise inside. zombies hate surprises.

heavy dark matter bomb.name: heavy dark matter bomb
heavy dark matter bomb.description: a solid chunk of dark matter with an explosive surprise inside. gremlins hate surprises.

heavy shard bomb.name: heavy shard bomb
heavy shard bomb.description: a solid chunk of depleted crimsonite with an explosive surprise inside. everybody loves surprises!

heavy splinter bomb.name: heavy splinter bomb
heavy splinter bomb.description: a solid chunk of synthetic mineral with an explosive surprise inside. wolvers hate surprises.

ionized salt bomb.name: ionized salt bomb
ionized salt bomb.description: a solid chunk of rock salt with an explosive surprise inside. jellies hate surprises.

radiant sun shards.name: radiant sun shards
radiant sun shards.description: a solid chunk of solar-charged luminite with an explosive surprise inside. devilites hate surprises.
radiant sun shards.notes: this bomb was radically altered in the august 8th 2012 update . the previous version exploded with eight "bullets" that traveled 12 tiles in the eight cardinal directions. a monster standing on top of the detonating bomb would catch all eight "bullets" for huge damage. it was very popular and frequently used to 1-hit kill trojans. wolvers would instinctively dodge the "bullets" as if they were fired from a gun. the alchemy path of this bomb was also changed during this update.

deconstructor.name: deconstructor
deconstructor.description: a bomb specially designed for dismantling machinery, sentient or otherwise.

fiery vaporizer mk ii.name: fiery vaporizer mk ii
fiery vaporizer mk ii.description: a fiery vaporizer modified to disperse combustible material over a wider range.

freezing vaporizer mk ii.name: freezing vaporizer mk ii
freezing vaporizer mk ii.description: an alchemical bomb that produces a cloud of ultra low temperature mist.

graviton charge.name: graviton charge
graviton charge.description: a small explosive charge with mysterious origins. it is capable of generating a vortex of crushing gravity.

slumber smogger mk ii.name: slumber smogger mk ii
slumber smogger mk ii.description: a slumber smogger modified to disperse sleepy smog over a wider range.
slumber smogger mk ii.notes: this item has been available since release 2017-05-11 .

super blast bomb.name: super blast bomb
super blast bomb.description: an upgraded blast bomb that combines an unstable heat source with untested explosive material to make one seriously unsafe package.

toxic vaporizer mk ii.name: toxic vaporizer mk ii
toxic vaporizer mk ii.description: a toxic vaporizer modified to disperse noxious agents over a wider range.

twisted spine cone.name: twisted spine cone
twisted spine cone.description: an enhanced spine cone that will thrash opponents with thorns and bury them in brambles.
twisted spine cone.notes: the twisted spine cone is part of the frumious fang token reward line. the items in this set include: twisted targe twisted spine cone twisted snarble barb

lightning capacitor.name: lightning capacitor
lightning capacitor.description: an upgraded capacitor that can explode with the fury of an electrical storm.

electron charge.name: electron charge
electron charge.description: a small electro-explosive charge with mysterious origins. it is capable of generating a crippling vortex of electricity.

haze bomb mk ii.name: haze bomb mk ii
haze bomb mk ii.description: a haze bomb modified to disperse noxious chemicals over a wider range.

dark reprisal mk ii.name: dark reprisal mk ii
dark reprisal mk ii.description: a refined version of the shadowy bomb that warmaster seerus engineered with the sole purpose of eliminating other gremlins that stood in his way.
dark reprisal mk ii.notes: the dark reprisal mk ii is part of the tier 2 operation crimson hammer gear. the items in this collection include: flawed mask of seerus dark reprisal mk ii stable rocket hammer

rock salt bomb.name: rock salt bomb
rock salt bomb.description: a shard bomb formed from a small bomb encased in rock salt. not recommended for use in the kitchen.

sun shards.name: sun shards
sun shards.description: a shard bomb formed from a small explosive encased in solar-charged luminite. whatever you do, don't look directly at it.

super crystal bomb.name: super crystal bomb
super crystal bomb.description: a shard bomb stuffed with even more alloy. apply directly to your foe's head.
super crystal bomb.notes: the line "apply directly to your foe's head" in the description is a reference to the headon commercials , where the catchphrase was "apply directly to the forehead".

super dark matter bomb.name: super dark matter bomb
super dark matter bomb.description: a shard bomb stuffed with even more dark matter. how much dark matter is too much? this much.

super shard bomb.name: super shard bomb
super shard bomb.description: a shard bomb stuffed with even more depleted crimsonite. the choicest cure for a combative creature is clearly a crystal to the cranium.

super splinter bomb.name: super splinter bomb
super splinter bomb.description: a shard bomb stuffed with even more synthetic mineral. it can also be used to mince vegetables, if you don't mind picking the occasional crystal out of your teeth.

blast bomb.name: blast bomb
blast bomb.description: an all-purpose bomb issued to spiral knights who have proven themselves in the field.

fiery vaporizer.name: fiery vaporizer
fiery vaporizer.description: an alchemical bomb that creates a cloud of highly combustible mist.

freezing vaporizer.name: freezing vaporizer
freezing vaporizer.description: an alchemical bomb that produces a cloud of ultra-low temperature mist.

slumber smogger.name: slumber smogger
slumber smogger.description: an alchemical bomb that fogs an area with a sleep agent.
slumber smogger.notes: this item has been available since release 2017-05-11 .

toxic vaporizer.name: toxic vaporizer
toxic vaporizer.description: an alchemical bomb that produces a noxious cloud of toxins.

spine cone.name: spine cone
spine cone.description: a ferocious device that is positively bursting with briars.

static capacitor.name: static capacitor
static capacitor.description: an explosive device of gremlin origin designed to produce a deadly field of electricity.

haze bomb.name: haze bomb
haze bomb.description: an alchemical bomb that creates a noxious cloud capable of stunning those caught inside.
haze bomb.notes: for the first 4 months after spiral knights left beta, haze bomb was a 1* item that was upgraded into the 2* freezing vaporizer, toxic vaporizer, or fiery vaporizer. the crafting cost of haze bomb was 3 light shards, 2 gel drops, 200 crowns and 10 energy. the recipe was available from vatel and basil for 250 crowns. history release 2011-04-04 : this item has been available since official launch. release 2011-08-02 : this item was promoted to 2-star. release 2012-05-09 : all bombs have had their damage increased by 15%. release 2013-07-30 : its recipe was changed.

dark reprisal.name: dark reprisal
dark reprisal.description: a potent bomb brimming with dark energy that warmaster seerus engineered with the sole purpose of eliminating other gremlins that stood in his way.
dark reprisal.notes: the dark reprisal is part of the tier 1 operation crimson hammer gear. the items in this collection include: fractured mask of seerus dark reprisal prototype rocket hammer

crystal bomb.name: crystal bomb
crystal bomb.description: a shard bomb formed from a small explosive encased in an alloy of moonstone and valestone. its soothing shade of cerulean has been clinically proven to both calm knights and annihilate the undead.

dark matter bomb.name: dark matter bomb
dark matter bomb.description: a shard bomb formed from a small explosive encased in dark matter. since its original discovery, dark matter has been put to a variety of uses, from powering spiral technology, to rearranging gremlins on a subatomic level.

shard bomb.name: shard bomb
shard bomb.description: a shard bomb formed from a small explosive encased in depleted crimsonite. depleted or not, this sucker can sling some serious shrapnel.

splinter bomb.name: splinter bomb
splinter bomb.description: a shard bomb formed from a small explosive encased in a synthetic mineral. prone to shattering, the otherwise useless material in this bomb is perfect for giving foes a nasty splinter.

cold snap.name: cold snap
cold snap.description: a proto bomb modified to generate small bursts of frost upon detonation.
cold snap.notes: despite this weapon being marked as causing moderate freeze, it actually inflicts strong freeze.

firecracker.name: firecracker
firecracker.description: a proto bomb modified to generate small bursts of fire upon detonation.
firecracker.notes: the achievement "star-spangled bomber" can be achieved by owning a firecracker on or after july 6th, 2011. despite this weapon being marked as causing moderate fire, it actually inflicts strong fire. the firecracker is part of the aeria games line. the items in this bundle include: ignition helm ignition armor emberbreak shield firecracker spitfire hot edge

static flash.name: static flash
static flash.description: a proto bomb modified to generate small bursts of electricity upon detonation.
static flash.notes: despite this weapon being marked as causing moderate shock, it actually inflicts strong shock. the static flash is part of the deluxe starter pack. the items in this pack include: tri-guard helm tri-guard armor green ward static flash chilling duelist red saber history release 2011-05-26 : this item was introduced along with the now obsolete starter pack . release 2014-01-01 : this item now belongs to the deluxe starter pack.

proto bomb.name: proto bomb
proto bomb.description: a small bomb used by spiral knight recruits to learn the art of blowing things up.

ancient plate helm.name: ancient plate helm
ancient plate helm.description: a vestigial helm whose weight makes it unwieldy to all but those with titanic strength.

azure guardian helm.name: azure guardian helm
azure guardian helm.description: a noble helmet reserved for the most senior members of the spiral order. the technique which weaves dragon scale seamlessly into the metal is a closely guarded secret.
azure guardian helm.notes: this item's design is reminiscent of a real-world bascinet .

crown of the fallen.name: crown of the fallen
crown of the fallen.description: a cursed crown once worn by a celestial being cast down from paradise.

bombastic demo helm.name: bombastic demo helm
bombastic demo helm.description: a finely-made helmet for the more discerning explosives expert. it won't tell you what kind of wine goes best with nitronome, but it'll certainly keep your head looking good. and in one piece.

chaos cowl.name: chaos cowl
chaos cowl.description: a hood of dubious origin that shrouds its wearer in both mystery and elemental protection.

deadshot chapeau.name: deadshot chapeau
deadshot chapeau.description: a mythical hat for those that never miss their mark. it's rumored to have been made from cloth that was previously interred.

divine veil.name: divine veil
divine veil.description: a heavenly hood of the style once worn by celestial sages.
divine veil.notes: while the divine veil offers a damage bonus against fiends , its partner divine mantle does not.

dragon scale helm.name: dragon scale helm
dragon scale helm.description: a mythical helmet crafted from the scales of a creature of legend.

dread skelly mask.name: dread skelly mask
dread skelly mask.description: the ultimate in haunted headgear, certain to protect your cranium from even the most hellish of shadow attacks.

grey feather cowl.name: grey feather cowl
grey feather cowl.description: a downy hood made for scholars who like to get out into the field. it's softer than the most luxurious of pillows, yet extraordinarily protective.

ironmight plate helm.name: ironmight plate helm
ironmight plate helm.description: a superior plate helmet forged from an alloy of several rare metals. it'll restrict your peripheral vision a bit but it's virtually impregnable.
ironmight plate helm.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched. with release 2013-07-30 , its recipe was changed.

justifier hat.name: justifier hat
justifier hat.description: a finely-made hat for handgun experts who think nothing of spending a few crowns more on a high-quality piece of gear.

mad bomber mask.name: mad bomber mask
mad bomber mask.description: a sturdy helmet designed to keep out explosions, radio waves and high-tech mind control devices. at least, that's what they *want* you to think it does.

nameless hat.name: nameless hat
nameless hat.description: a nameless hat worn by a nameless hero of legend.
nameless hat.notes: nameless hat's name and description allude to the hero of the dollars trilogy films. the helmet has been in the game since launch (see release 2011-04-04 ). it acquired freeze resistance in the gun balancing release 2012-03-22 .

royal jelly crown.name: royal jelly crown
royal jelly crown.description: ruggedly royal regalia recently reproduced from regally resinous remains.

shadowsun stetson.name: shadowsun stetson
shadowsun stetson.description: a dashing hat for duelists who prefer to get their work done at midnight, rather than high noon.
shadowsun stetson.notes: the name " stetson " refers to the classic cowboy hat. the item description alludes to the western film high noon . shadowsun stetson has been in the game since launch (see release 2011-04-04 ). its defenses and offensive abilities changed significantly in release 2012-03-22 . its recipe changed in release 2013-07-30 .

valkyrie helm.name: valkyrie helm
valkyrie helm.description: a priceless helmet whose name denizens of the underworld dare not mention.
valkyrie helm.notes: in norse mythology, a valkyrie is a kind of angel, who carries slain warriors from the battlefield. valkyrie helm has been in the game since launch (see release 2011-04-04 ). its recipe was changed in release 2013-07-30 .

volcanic demo helm.name: volcanic demo helm
volcanic demo helm.description: a cutting-edge helm reinforced with volcanic iron and designed for use with high-temperature explosives.

volcanic plate helm.name: volcanic plate helm

deadly virulisk mask.name: deadly virulisk mask

volcanic salamander mask.name: volcanic salamander mask

skolver cap.name: skolver cap

vog cub cap.name: vog cub cap

vog cub cap.notes: this item was introduced with release 2011-03-03 .

mercurial helm.name: mercurial helm

arcane salamander mask.name: arcane salamander mask

almirian crusader helm.name: almirian crusader helm

perfect mask of seerus.name: perfect mask of seerus

perfect mask of seerus.notes: unlike many helmets, the lower-star versions of the mask of seerus cannot be crafted upward. each mask is made as-is, at the indicated star level. this item is in a collection with others obtained in tier 3 och : perfect mask of seerus dark retribution warmaster rocket hammer

icebreaker helm.description: a frostbreaker helm modified to provide further protection against freeze.

jelly helm.description: gelatinous headgear made from gooey guardians.

magic hood.description: an enchanting hood for knights who dabble in divination and contemplate conjuring.

skelly mask.name: skelly mask
skelly mask.description: a spooky mask good for both scaring children and protecting from shadow attacks.
skelly mask.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched.

spiral demo helm.name: spiral demo helm
spiral demo helm.description: a sturdy helm designed for use by explosively-inclined knights.
spiral demo helm.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched.

spiral plate helm.name: spiral plate helm
spiral plate helm.description: a heavyweight helm made of iron designed to withstand stunning impacts.
spiral plate helm.notes: this helmet went by the name "templar plate helm" during the preview event.

volt breaker helm.name: volt breaker helm
volt breaker helm.description: a circuit breaker helm modified to provide further protection against shock.

wolver cap.name: wolver cap
wolver cap.description: a lively hat made from significantly less lively wolver hide.
wolver cap.notes: this item was introduced with release 2011-03-03 .

pathfinder helm.name: pathfinder helm
pathfinder helm.description: a helm handy for blazing trails and protecting against the bites of hungry monsters in the wild.
pathfinder helm.notes: this item was introduced with release 2014-12-03 .

sentinel helm.name: sentinel helm
sentinel helm.description: a helm imbued with the power to repel the various afflictions that knights might encounter in the line of duty.
sentinel helm.notes: this item was introduced with release 2014-12-03 .

shade helm.name: shade helm
shade helm.description: a dark matter infused helm that allows its wearer to get the drop on foes by shooting straight from the shadows.
shade helm.notes: this item was introduced with release 2014-12-03 .

circuit breaker helm.name: circuit breaker helm
circuit breaker helm.description: a spiral helm modified to provide additional protection against shock, at the expense of fire and freeze resistance.

emberbreak helm.name: emberbreak helm
emberbreak helm.description: a spiral helm modified to provide additional protection against fire, at the expense of freeze and shock resistance.

frostbreaker helm.name: frostbreaker helm
frostbreaker helm.description: a spiral helm modified to provide additional protection against freeze, at the expense of fire and shock resistance.

spiral scale helm.name: spiral scale helm
spiral scale helm.description: a light helm that slightly shields oneself from piercing strikes.

fractured mask of seerus.name: fractured mask of seerus
fractured mask of seerus.description: a remake of a mask once worn by warmaster seerus of the crimson order. made from fractured mask fragments, it only somewhat resembles the original.
fractured mask of seerus.notes: unlike many helmets, the lower-star versions of the mask of seerus cannot be crafted upward. each mask is made as-is, at the indicated star level. this item is in a collection with others obtained in tier 1 och : prototype rocket hammer dark reprisal fractured mask of seerus

ignition helm.name: ignition helm
ignition helm.description: a lightweight helmet augmented to keep a knight's head cool under pressure.
ignition helm.notes: this item was introduced 2013.09 29 may 2013 with the aeria games bundle . with release 2013-08-21 the item was made available from greave.

tri-guard helm.name: tri-guard helm
tri-guard helm.description: a special helmet designed specifically for knights on first recon of alien planets. this rugged helmet protects against a variety of harsh elements.
tri-guard helm.notes: this item was introduced with the deluxe starter pack for the new (2014) year.

padded cap.name: padded cap
padded cap.description: a one size fits all light helm that is typically worn by gunslingers.
padded cap.notes: this helmet was introduced with release 2014-12-03 .

cyclops cap.name: cyclops cap
cyclops cap.description: a strange helm with a single, focused eye favored by junior gunners.

mining hat.name: mining hat
mining hat.description: a sturdy, old helmet once used to dig for precious minerals. it offers a little more defense than a spiral helm.

groundbreaker helm.name: groundbreaker helm
groundbreaker helm.description: a sturdy helm worn by knights who were among the first to brave the depths of the clockworks.
groundbreaker helm.notes: the mining hat is exactly the same in stats and similar in appearance.

spiral sallet.name: spiral sallet
spiral sallet.description: a light helmet issued to all spiral knight recruits.
spiral sallet.notes: this item becomes paired with an armor of the player's choosing and becomes their spiral set. in relation to other items in the game, the spiral sallet can be considered to be in a set with the spiral cuirass .

spiral pith helm.name: spiral pith helm
spiral pith helm.description: a light helmet issued to all spiral knight recruits.
spiral pith helm.notes: this item becomes paired with an armor of the player's choosing and becomes their spiral set. in relation to other items in the game, the spiral pith helm can be considered to be in a set with the spiral brigandine .

spiral tailed helm.name: spiral tailed helm
spiral tailed helm.description: a light helmet issued to all spiral knight recruits.
spiral tailed helm.notes: this item becomes paired with an armor of the player's choosing and becomes their spiral set. in relation to other items in the game, the spiral tailed helm can be considered to be in a set with the spiral culet .

spiral round helm.name: spiral round helm
spiral round helm.description: a light helmet issued to all spiral knight recruits.
spiral round helm.notes: this item becomes paired with an armor of the player's choosing and becomes their spiral set. in relation to other items in the game, the spiral round helm can be considered to be in a set with the spiral draped armor .

spiral crescent helm.name: spiral crescent helm
spiral crescent helm.description: a light helmet issued to all spiral knight recruits.
spiral crescent helm.notes: this item becomes paired with an armor of the player's choosing and becomes their spiral set. in relation to other items in the game, the spiral crescent helm can be considered to be in a set with the spiral flak jacket .

almirian crusader armor.name: almirian crusader armor
almirian crusader armor.description: armor once worn by the elite royal guard of the kingdom of almire. its ivory color was a symbol of almire's purity, both in the land and in the hearts of its people.
almirian crusader armor.notes: as of the release 2012-06-06 , almirian royal guard monsters wear almirian crusader helms and armor.

ancient plate mail.name: ancient plate mail
ancient plate mail.description: a suit of artifact armor that is said to have been worn by titans. though it offers amazing protection, its incredible weight makes it cumbersome to wear.
ancient plate mail.notes: this item's actual "normal" defense greatly exceeds the value implied by its stats bar.

arcane salamander suit.name: arcane salamander suit
arcane salamander suit.description: a salamander suit imbued with magical power. it is thought to be made from the familiars of powerful witches.

armor of the fallen.name: armor of the fallen
armor of the fallen.description: a cursed suit of armor once worn by a celestial being cast down from paradise.

azure guardian armor.name: azure guardian armor
azure guardian armor.description: a grand set of armor commonly donned by the leaders of the spiral order. it is as close fitting as the hide of a beast, and yet is as comfortable to wear as flowing miracloth.

black kat raiment.name: black kat raiment
black kat raiment.description: a reclaimed raiment that is brimming with dark energy. it is said to resemble the great kat tribe hero, margrel, the one who opened the book of grey feathers and brought about the kataclysm. it brings great misfortune to anyone who dares to wear it.
black kat raiment.notes: the black kat raiment was added to the game during the fourth kataclysmic confrontation in september 2014.

bombastic demo suit.name: bombastic demo suit
bombastic demo suit.description: a fine set of armor specially forged for those select few individuals who can handle explosives with panache and flair... while managing to avoid blowing themselves up.

chaos cloak.name: chaos cloak
chaos cloak.description: a forbidden mantle said to grant the wearer protection within the nameless realm where all elements are said to converge into one and divide into all.

deadly virulisk suit.name: deadly virulisk suit
deadly virulisk suit.description: a fine suit made out of hide from the deadliest of virulisks. sadly, it doesn't appear to have retained any of the virulisk's ability to camouflage.

deadshot mantle.name: deadshot mantle
deadshot mantle.description: a poncho for a pale rider with sights set on taking down the bad, ugly, undead denizens of the dark.
deadshot mantle.notes: the description references the clint eastwood films pale rider and the good, the bad, and the ugly . deadshot mantle has been in the game since launch (see release 2011-04-04 ). its accessory behavior was altered in release 2012-02-22 . in release 2012-03-22 it acquired its handgun speed bonus; before this update, it merely offered an undead damage bonus. its recipe changed in release 2013-07-30 .

divine mantle.name: divine mantle
divine mantle.description: a heavenly cloak thought to be once worn by celestial sages.
divine mantle.notes: divine mantle offers no damage bonus vs. fiends , although its partner divine veil does.

dragon scale mail.name: dragon scale mail
dragon scale mail.description: mythical armor crafted from the scales of a creature of legend.

dread skelly suit.name: dread skelly suit
dread skelly suit.description: the most fearsome skelly suit known to exist. there is nothing humerus about these dreadful duds.

grey feather mantle.name: grey feather mantle
grey feather mantle.description: a cloak for renowned owlite scholars, this feathery frock is filled with the wisdom of the ages... and is super soft!

heavenly iron armor.name: heavenly iron armor
heavenly iron armor.description: a powerful suit of armor said to be crafted from angelic shields. it retains many divine properties celestial beings possess but lacks their weakness to fire.

ice queen mail.name: ice queen mail
ice queen mail.description: a regal suit of armor resembling the ever-frigid ice queen. in addition to providing great defense, it is said to dramatically boost one's ego and create a cold detachment from those around them.

ironmight plate mail.name: ironmight plate mail
ironmight plate mail.description: superior plate mail forged from an alloy of several rare metals. it's restrictive, but incredibly strong.
ironmight plate mail.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched. with release 2013-07-30 , its recipe was changed.

justifier jacket.name: justifier jacket
justifier jacket.description: a finely-made suit for danger-seeking gunslingers who would much rather be quick than dead.
justifier jacket.notes: the item description may reference the western film the quick and the dead . justifier jacket has been in the game since launch (see release 2011-04-04 ). it acquired stun resistance in release 2012-03-22 . its recipe changed in release 2013-07-30 .

kat claw raiment.name: kat claw raiment
kat claw raiment.description: a reclaimed raiment said to resemble the kat tribe hero, scraith, first to scale the walls of the owlite high academy of magicks.
kat claw raiment.notes: the kat claw raiment was added to the game during the fourth kataclysmic confrontation in september 2014.

kat eye raiment.name: kat eye raiment
kat eye raiment.description: a reclaimed raiment said to resemble the kat tribe hero, preowa, whose artillery silenced the grey feather tower sages.
kat eye raiment.notes: the kat eye raiment was added to the game during the fourth kataclysmic confrontation in september 2014.

kat hiss raiment.name: kat hiss raiment
kat hiss raiment.description: a reclaimed raiment said to resemble the kat tribe hero, torair, who clung to the gates of the owlite high academy of magicks as both it and his explosives burned.
kat hiss raiment.notes: the kat hiss raiment was added to the game during the fourth kataclysmic confrontation in september 2014.

mad bomber suit.name: mad bomber suit
mad bomber suit.description: some people have axes to grind. others have points to make. this armor is for those of us with explosive tempers.

mercurial demo suit.name: mercurial demo suit
mercurial demo suit.description: a demo suit made from gremlin technology. it is for the bomber that wants a boost of speed, more power and a greatly reduced chance of dying by electrocution... which is probably every bomber out there.
mercurial demo suit.notes: this item was introduced with release 2011-10-19 along with shadow lairs . prismatic pylons are an accessory similar to the object on this item's back.

mercurial mail.name: mercurial mail

mercurial mail.notes: this item was introduced with release 2011-07-06 .

shadowsun slicker.description: an evil duster that is said to harbor a great power that feeds off of the unforgiven sins of its owners.
shadowsun slicker.notes: the item description alludes to the clint eastwood film unforgiven . shadowsun slicker has been in the game since launch (see release 2011-04-04 ). its defenses and offensive abilities changed significantly in release 2012-03-22 . its recipe changed in release 2013-07-30 .

skolver coat.name: skolver coat
skolver coat.description: the ultimate in wolver-hide clothing, this coat has been expertly crafted to give your melee attacks extra power.

snarbolax coat.name: snarbolax coat
snarbolax coat.description: a shadowy suit made from the hide of a sinister snarbolax. even looking at it too closely is dangerous.

starlit demo suit.name: starlit demo suit
starlit demo suit.description: an advanced demolitions suit capable of resisting the strongest sleep mists. the soft glow is strangely stimulating.
starlit demo suit.notes: this item was introduced with release 2017-05-11 . compared to its sword focused counterpart, it also offers slight damage bonus against slimes.

starlit hunting coat.name: starlit hunting coat
starlit hunting coat.description: an advanced, star-soaked hunting coat that will keep you awake even as it coddles you in downy comfort.
starlit hunting coat.notes: this item was introduced with release 2017-05-11 . it was originally missing the aura accessory slot, but this was added with a later update .

valkyrie mail.name: valkyrie mail
valkyrie mail.description: a priceless set of armor whose name denizens of the underworld dare not mention.
valkyrie mail.notes: in norse mythology, a valkyrie is a kind of angel, who carries slain warriors from the battlefield. valkyrie mail has been in the game since launch (see release 2011-04-04 ). its recipe was changed in release 2013-07-30 .

vog cub coat.name: vog cub coat
vog cub coat.description: this hide garment is so warm and thick that you won't even mind that it reeks of wood smoke.
vog cub coat.notes: this item was introduced with release 2011-03-03 .

volcanic demo suit.name: volcanic demo suit
volcanic demo suit.description: highly protective gear for the cutting-edge demolition man. the internal cooling system makes you feel a little like you've been cryogenically frozen.
volcanic demo suit.notes: volcanic demo suit's description seems to reference the film demolition man , which deals with both explosives and cryogenic freezing. volcanic demo suit has been in the game since launch (see release 2011-04-04 ). prior to release 2012-03-08 , the suit offered bomb ctr+1 while the helmet offered bomb ctr+2. that release increased the suit's ctr to +2. volcanic demo suit's recipe was changed in release 2013-07-30 .

volcanic plate mail.name: volcanic plate mail
volcanic plate mail.description: superior plate mail imbued with the elemental essence of flame and designed to withstand tremendous impact.

volcanic salamander suit.name: volcanic salamander suit

quilted hunting coat.description: a flexible coat lined with luxurious stay-alert quilting. it smells musty.
quilted hunting coat.notes: this item was introduced with release 2017-05-11 .

rock jelly mail.name: rock jelly mail
rock jelly mail.description: this gelatinous gear combines the sturdiness of stone with the piercing protection of sticky goo. it's a wonder that you managed to beat up the jelly this is made out of.
rock jelly mail.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched.

salamander suit.name: salamander suit
salamander suit.description: a suit crafted from the hide of a salamander. it grants the wearer the beast's natural resistance to fire.
salamander suit.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched.

seraphic mail.name: seraphic mail
seraphic mail.description: a beautiful mail coat that causes its wearer to strike out at evil with righteous fury.
seraphic mail.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched.

silvermail.name: silvermail
silvermail.description: strong, yet light armor for knights who've sworn an oath to hunt down and destroy the undead, wherever it may lurk.
silvermail.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched.

sinister skelly suit.name: sinister skelly suit
sinister skelly suit.description: a bony barrier that throbs with malevolence. anyone skeptical of this suit's power deserves a good ribbing.
sinister skelly suit.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched.

sunset duster.name: sunset duster
sunset duster.description: a sturdy set of leather clothing made for a pilgrim with true grit.
sunset duster.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched. this item's name alludes to sunset , a western film directed by blake edwards. its description alludes to true grit , a western film directed by henry hathaway.

virulisk suit.name: virulisk suit
virulisk suit.description: a thick set of gear crafted from the carcass of a virulisk. wearers will inherit some of the virulisk's poison resistance, as well as its taste for flan.
virulisk suit.notes: this item was introduced with release 2011-03-03 . its description, as well as the description of the winterfest tree , implies that virulisks and other chromas are predators of slimes .

vitasuit deluxe.name: vitasuit deluxe
vitasuit deluxe.description: four out of five spiral medics recommend this armor for everyday use. the fifth was crushed by a tortodrone.
vitasuit deluxe.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched. the vitasuit and vitasuit plus are similar, but are not in an alchemy path with this item.

wyvern scale mail.name: wyvern scale mail
wyvern scale mail.description: it requires extreme temperatures to forge this fine armor made from the scales of rare clockworks beasts.
wyvern scale mail.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched.

angelic raiment.name: angelic raiment
angelic raiment.description: a beautiful suit of armor that constantly shines as if illuminated by the sun.
angelic raiment.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched.

black kat cloak.name: black kat cloak
black kat cloak.description: a crudely crafted cloak made to resemble a shadowy sapper of the ill-fated kat tribe.
black kat cloak.notes: the black kat cloak was introduced during the fourth kataclysmic confrontation in september 2014.

blazebreak armor.name: blazebreak armor
blazebreak armor.description: a reliable set of armor adept at deflecting the most fiery of rhetoric. it's not bad at resisting flame attacks, either.

blizzbreaker armor.name: blizzbreaker armor
blizzbreaker armor.description: a reliable set of armor adept at shrugging off the coldest of shoulders. it's not bad at resisting freeze attacks, either.

boosted plate mail.name: boosted plate mail
boosted plate mail.description: a suit of spiral plate mail with a supercharged internal power source. the upgrade didn't make the armor any lighter.

brute jelly mail.name: brute jelly mail
brute jelly mail.description: a firm set of mucilaginous mail crafted from the remains of particularly antagonistic jellies.

chroma suit.name: chroma suit
chroma suit.description: a suit crafted from the hide of a chromalisk. surprisingly, chromalisks seem to find the existence of these armors flattering.

drake scale mail.name: drake scale mail
drake scale mail.description: armor forged from the scales of beasts thought to be descendants of dragons.
drake scale mail.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched.

dusker coat.name: dusker coat

dusker coat.notes: this item was introduced with release 2011-03-03 .

elemental cloak.name: elemental cloak
elemental cloak.description: a fine robe with numerous forms of elemental protection woven right into the fabric.

fused demo suit.name: fused demo suit
fused demo suit.description: an upgraded demo suit fused dangerously with the unstable core from a powerful blast cube. even still, you should feel a lot safer wearing this.
fused demo suit.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched. with release 2013-07-30 , its recipe was changed.

gunslinger sash.name: gunslinger sash
gunslinger sash.description: clothing worn by pistol-packing warriors from a forgotten time. they smell of rawhide, gun smoke and action.

icebreaker armor.description: upgraded frostbreaker armor further hacked to resist freeze.

jelly mail.description: a squishy set of armor made from slippery slimes that simply oozes with style.

magic cloak.description: a wondrous robe worn by apprentices in the art of spells and sorcery.

pathfinder armor.description: a handy set of armor for blazing trails and protecting against the bites of hungry monsters in the wild.
pathfinder armor.notes: this item was introduced with release 2014-12-03 .

skelly suit.description: a bone-chilling outfit that naturally wards off shadowy attacks.

spiral demo suit.description: sturdy armor designed for use by explosively-inclined knights.
spiral demo suit.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched.

spiral plate mail.name: spiral plate mail
spiral plate mail.description: heavyweight armor made of iron plates that can withstand a great deal of standard attacks.
spiral plate mail.notes: spiral plate mail went by the name "templar plate mail" during the preview event.

vitasuit plus.name: vitasuit plus
vitasuit plus.description: high-tech mail that provides the wearer with myriad medical boons, including bonus health, glossier hair, and fresher breath.
vitasuit plus.notes: the vitasuit and vitasuit deluxe are similar, but are not in an alchemy path with this item.

volt breaker armor.name: volt breaker armor
volt breaker armor.description: upgraded circuit breaker armor further hacked to resist shock.

wolver coat.name: wolver coat
wolver coat.description: a thick garment to protect your hide, made from a wolver who failed to protect his.
wolver coat.notes: this item was introduced with release 2011-03-03 .

circuit breaker armor.name: circuit breaker armor
circuit breaker armor.description: armor with a hacked elemental core aimed at resisting shock. however, this non-standard modification creates other elemental weaknesses.

emberbreak armor.name: emberbreak armor
emberbreak armor.description: armor with a hacked elemental core aimed at resisting fire. however, this non-standard modification creates other elemental weaknesses.

frostbreaker armor.name: frostbreaker armor
frostbreaker armor.description: armor with a hacked elemental core aimed at resisting freeze. however, this non-standard modification creates other elemental weaknesses.

ignition armor.name: ignition armor
ignition armor.description: light armor augmented to help protect knights venturing into heated situations.
ignition armor.notes: this item was introduced 2013.09 29 may 2013 with the aeria games bundle . with release 2013-08-21 the item was made available from greave.

padded armor.name: padded armor
padded armor.description: a loose-fitting set of light armor that is typically worn by gunslingers.
padded armor.notes: this armor was introduced with release 2014-12-03 .

spiral scale mail.name: spiral scale mail
spiral scale mail.description: durable, light mail that provides protection from piercing attacks.

tri-guard armor.name: tri-guard armor
tri-guard armor.description: a special suit of armor designed specifically for knights on first recon of alien planets. this rugged suit protects against a variety of harsh elements.
tri-guard armor.notes: this item was introduced with the deluxe starter pack for the new (2014) year.

fencing jacket.name: fencing jacket
fencing jacket.description: a loose-fitting frock favored by fledgling fencers.

vitasuit.name: vitasuit
vitasuit.description: a special suit that provides a hearty, healthy bonus to the wearer.

groundbreaker armor.name: groundbreaker armor
groundbreaker armor.description: a suit of armor worn by knights who were among the first to brave the depths of the clockworks.

spiral brigandine.name: spiral brigandine
spiral brigandine.description: light armor issued to all spiral knight recruits.
spiral brigandine.notes: this item becomes paired with a helmet of the player's choosing and becomes their spiral set. compared to other items in the game, the brigandine can be considered to be in a set with the spiral pith helm , based on the icebreaker family.

spiral cuirass.name: spiral cuirass
spiral cuirass.description: light armor issued to all spiral knight recruits.
spiral cuirass.notes: this item becomes paired with a helmet of the player's choosing and becomes their spiral set. in relation to other items in the game, the cuirass can be considered to be in a set with the spiral sallet , based on the circuitbreaker family.

spiral culet.name: spiral culet
spiral culet.description: light armor issued to all spiral knight recruits.
spiral culet.notes: this item becomes paired with a helmet of the player's choosing and becomes their spiral set. in relation to other items in the game, the culet can be considered to be in a set with the spiral tailed helm , based on the emberbreak family.

spiral draped armor.name: spiral draped armor
spiral draped armor.description: light armor issued to all spiral knight recruits.
spiral draped armor.notes: this item becomes paired with a helmet of the player's choosing and becomes their spiral set. in relation to other items in the game, the draped armor can be considered to be in a set with the spiral round helm .

spiral flak jacket.name: spiral flak jacket
spiral flak jacket.description: light armor issued to all spiral knight recruits.
spiral flak jacket.notes: this item becomes paired with a helmet of the player's choosing and becomes their spiral set. in relation to other items in the game, the spiral flak jacket can be considered to be in a set with the spiral crescent helm .

ancient plate shield.name: ancient plate shield
ancient plate shield.description: an antique shield whose origins have been lost to the passing of time.

aegis.name: aegis
aegis.description: a sublime shield entrusted to only the most worthy members of the spiral order. whether its crest is a relic from the order of old or a creation from the knights' time on cradle is not immediately clear.
aegis.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched. in greek mythology, aegis is the shield of the goddess athena. in modern usage, aegis refers to the protection of a benevolent force — in this case, perhaps the spiral order , whose symbol aegis carries. behind the shield there are two side blade -like objects.

dragon scale shield.name: dragon scale shield
dragon scale shield.description: a mythical shield crafted from the scales of a creature of legend.

dread skelly shield.name: dread skelly shield
dread skelly shield.description: a large, bony bulwark bathed in blackish brume. it occasionally issues a quiet, forlorn whisper, usually about remembering to block.

grey owlite shield.name: grey owlite shield
grey owlite shield.description: a resplendent replica of the shield thought to have been issued to the most eminent of owlite wizards. wielding it fills you with righteous vengeance.

ironmight plate shield.name: ironmight plate shield
ironmight plate shield.description: a superior shield forged from sun silver. the meaning of the crest on its face has been lost to time.

royal jelly shield.name: royal jelly shield
royal jelly shield.description: prime protection for pretenders to the jelly throne.

volcanic plate shield.name: volcanic plate shield
volcanic plate shield.description: a superior shield imbued with the elemental essence of flame. it is so resistant to high temperatures that it's a mystery how exactly it was forged in the first place.

omega shell.name: omega shell
omega shell.description: a shield created from the armor of a tortomega. the sheer weight of this powerful shield makes it only an option for the strongest of warriors.
omega shell.notes: this item has been in the game long before the first march of the tortodrones event and is unrelated to the various tortodrone shields crafted at the mysterious alchemy machine .

heater shield.name: heater shield
heater shield.description: a shield with a built-in furnace that keeps its user toasty warm, protecting them from most freeze attacks. many knights also use it as a makeshift stove top when out in the field.

crest of almire.name: crest of almire
crest of almire.description: a shimmering crest once proudly carried by the noble knights of almire. it is said to bless those who fight for their homeland, granting them strength from within.

barbarous thorn shield.name: barbarous thorn shield
barbarous thorn shield.description: a mythical shield imbued with the fury of the snarbolax itself. it's said the beast can use the glowing orbs on the shield's face to see and stalk weak-hearted wielders.

gorgomega.name: gorgomega
gorgomega.description: a terrifying shield that combines the dual-crushing power of a gorgo and the mythical tortomega. crushing enemies has never been more fiendishly fun.

grand tortoise.name: grand tortoise
grand tortoise.description: a shield empowered by the limitless fury of a tortodrone. the very plates of this colossal carapace shake as the unstable energy within waits to be unleashed.

omegaward.name: omegaward
omegaward.description: the pulsing elemental plates of this shield instantaneously react to adverse climates protecting you from even the most extreme cold or heat.

savage tortoise.name: savage tortoise
savage tortoise.description: a shield alchemized from a hardened tortodrone shell. even a rampaging wolver pack would have a hard time puncturing its reinforced plates.

celestial shield.name: celestial shield

prize_box_names: randomly from an equinox prize box

celestial shield.description: cradle's equinox inspired the dual nature of this specialist shield, which protects against the dazzling light of day and the chill of the night in equal measure.
celestial shield.notes: this item was introduced during the equinox prize box promotion in march 2014. it seems to mimic cosmic aspects of cradle . it features a sun like the "suns" seen within the various sky domes found within the clockworks, and a glowing dot colored like cradle's moon .

power mitt.name: power mitt

prize_box_names: randomly from a confection prize box

power mitt.description: a must have in every kitchen. the comfortable fit and heavyweight silverweave surface are great for handling high heat. now you're cooking with power!
power mitt.notes: this item was introduced during the confection prize box promotion in august 2014. its stat values are almost identical to the heater shield : instead of freeze resistance, the power mit provides fire resistance. unlike other shields, the power mitt rests on the user's hand, instead of on the user's back, while in non-combat areas such as haven as long as it is equipped to the shield slot. the power mitt features prismatic glowing stripes around a metallic pad on the back of the thick glove body. its description alludes to the nintendo power glove in which it was quoted "you're playing with power!" which with the power mitt "you're cooking with power!" the power mitt is part of a group of "culinary" items, which include a variety of combat gear as well as aesthetic pieces from different parts of the game. view the full list here .

teddy bear buckler.name: teddy bear buckler

prize_box_names: randomly from a slumber prize box

teddy bear buckler.description: a high-tech energy shield disguised as a harmless teddy bear. the perfect companion to defend against minions of the night.
teddy bear buckler.notes: this item was released 19 august 2015 during the slumber prize box promotion august 2015 . its stats are similar to the gorgomega . the teddy has more normal defense and less shadow defense. shield bash is normal.

blackened crest.name: blackened crest
blackened crest.description: a shield once carried by a knight of almire, now a cursed relic that has been nearly burned beyond recognition within the firestorm citadel. very powerful alchemy would be required to restore it to its former glory.

darkfang shield.name: darkfang shield
darkfang shield.description: a shield repurposed by gremlins and worn by darkfang thwackers. similar to the gremlins themselves, it is resistant to fire and shock attacks. knights who use these shields report that it is impossible to completely remove all the fur stuck to it.

heavy plate shield.name: heavy plate shield
heavy plate shield.description: a huge reinforced shield perfect for brushing off blows and fending off foes.

mighty defender.name: mighty defender
mighty defender.description: an advanced spiral knight shield, reinforced for battle and beautifully embossed for the stories afterward.

rock jelly shield.name: rock jelly shield
rock jelly shield.description: crafted from the most adamant of slimy specimens, it also functions as an emergency source of calories for stranded knights.

sinister skelly shield.name: sinister skelly shield
sinister skelly shield.description: a kite shield haunted by a benevolent ghost. it should help you put up a spirited defense against shadow.

stone tortoise.name: stone tortoise
stone tortoise.description: a large, powerful shield made to resemble a creature's shell. its formidable weight can make attacking more difficult.
stone tortoise.notes: during the preview event, the stone tortoise was a guaranteed drop from the original tortodrone . this item has been in the game long before the first march of the tortodrones event and is unrelated to the various tortodrone shields crafted at the mysterious alchemy machine .

wise owlite shield.name: wise owlite shield
wise owlite shield.description: it doesn't take a renowned owlite scholar to figure out that defending oneself with a shield is an excellent idea.

wyvern scale shield.name: wyvern scale shield
wyvern scale shield.description: a spiny buckler forged from beast chitin, providing ample resistance to both heat and venom.

dark thorn shield.name: dark thorn shield
dark thorn shield.description: a gloomy guard that gives one's sword strikes a supernatural savagery.

barrier shell.name: barrier shell
barrier shell.description: a shield alchemized from the shell of a tortodrone. the elemental resiliency of a tortodrone on the long migration should aid you on your own journeys through harsh environments.

feral shell.name: feral shell
feral shell.description: a shield alchemized from a hardened tortodrone shell. even the sharpest wolver claws merely glance off this compact carapace.

mighty shell.name: mighty shell
mighty shell.description: a shield alchemized from the shell of a tortodrone. while wielding it, you can feel the berserk energies within just waiting to be unleashed.

nether shell.name: nether shell
nether shell.description: a shield alchemized from the shell of a corrupted tortodrone. a tormented howl of rage can be heard on the wind when this shield smashes through your foes.

blazebreak shield.name: blazebreak shield
blazebreak shield.description: a reliable shield that'll keep you from getting too fired up in battle.

blizzbreaker shield.name: blizzbreaker shield
blizzbreaker shield.description: a reliable shield that'll prevent your foes from keeping you on ice.

boosted plate shield.name: boosted plate shield
boosted plate shield.description: a beautifully refinished plate shield that's been given an internal power source to help keep the most battering of blows at bay.

brute jelly shield.name: brute jelly shield
brute jelly shield.description: a thick shield made from the remains of particularly ill-mannered slimes. it is durable, light, and delightfully berry-flavored.

drake scale shield.name: drake scale shield
drake scale shield.description: a solid shield shaped from stout scales.

great defender.name: great defender
great defender.description: a sturdy defender upgraded with its own internal energy source for more effective protection.

horned owlite shield.name: horned owlite shield
horned owlite shield.description: a sturdy shield similar to the sort said to have been carried by owlite youth.

scarlet shield.name: scarlet shield
scarlet shield.description: a shield found within the scarlet fortress. it grants the user extra health. those that carry one have said that they can sometimes hear a faint heartbeat emanating from within it.

scary skelly shield.name: scary skelly shield
scary skelly shield.description: a small, spooky shield to safeguard you from shadow.

surge breaker shield.name: surge breaker shield
surge breaker shield.description: a reliable shield that'll help keep you grounded in battle.
surge breaker shield.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched.

swiftstrike buckler.name: swiftstrike buckler
swiftstrike buckler.description: a small, easy to use shield that enables the user to perform fast attacks.
swiftstrike buckler.notes: the original description said it only affected melee weapons, although it still affected all weapons. it was changed in 2019.18 19 november 2019 .

twisted targe.name: twisted targe
twisted targe.description: a tulgey targe that will give your sword thrusts some teeth.

grim shell.name: grim shell
grim shell.description: a shield alchemized from the shell of a corrupted tortodrone. shadows seem to lengthen and cling to it whenever it is brought to bear.

primal shell.name: primal shell
primal shell.description: a shield alchemized from the shell of a tortodrone. the plates used in its construction provide some protection against the elements of fire and freeze.

stoic shell.name: stoic shell
stoic shell.description: a shield alchemized from the shell of a tortodrone. while wielding it, you sense the quiet passing of the wind and can call upon the rumbling storm that follows.

wild shell.name: wild shell
wild shell.description: a shield alchemized from a hardened tortodrone shell. it's tough enough to dull a jelly barb on impact.

defender.name: defender
defender.description: a durable, high quality shield of the spiral order that is suitable for any adventure.

firebreak shield.name: firebreak shield
firebreak shield.description: an emberbreak shield modified for increased protection against fire.

icebreaker shield.name: icebreaker shield
icebreaker shield.description: a frostbreaker shield modified for increased protection against freeze.

jelly shield.name: jelly shield
jelly shield.description: a strange looking shield created from jelly matter. like many slime monsters themselves, it provides the user with exceptional defense against piercing damage.

owlite shield.name: owlite shield
owlite shield.description: a wooden ward carved with the crude image of a long-lost owlite.

plate shield.name: plate shield
plate shield.description: a heavy iron shield adept at deflecting impacts that would otherwise leave you stunned.

skelly shield.name: skelly shield
skelly shield.description: a bedeviled buckler best used for blocking bad energy.

volt breaker shield.name: volt breaker shield
volt breaker shield.description: a circuit breaker shield modified for increased protection against shock.
volt breaker shield.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched.

bristling buckler.name: bristling buckler
bristling buckler.description: a small shield spiked to supplement your sword in a skirmish.

circuit breaker shield.name: circuit breaker shield
circuit breaker shield.description: a proto shield modified to provide some protection against shock.
circuit breaker shield.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched.

emberbreak shield.name: emberbreak shield
emberbreak shield.description: a proto shield modified to provide some protection against fire.
emberbreak shield.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched. it is part of the "aeria games" bundle, which was introduced in may 2013. [1] items in the aeria games bundle include: ignition helm ignition armor emberbreak shield firecracker spitfire hot edge

frostbreaker shield.name: frostbreaker shield
frostbreaker shield.description: a proto shield modified to provide some protection against freeze.
frostbreaker shield.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched.

force buckler.name: force buckler
force buckler.description: a proto shield modified to resist stunning impacts.
force buckler.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched.

scale shield.name: scale shield
scale shield.description: a very stylish shield made from lizard scales. while otherwise somewhat weak, the tight mesh of scales makes it highly resistant to pierce damage.

green ward.name: green ward
green ward.description: a sturdy shield with an emerald sheen that saves spiral knight recruits from the perils of sharp spikes and deadly toxins.
green ward.notes: this item was introduced with release 2011-05-26 . it was originally available via the starter pack . this "starter pack" was replaced with the deluxe starter pack in january 2014. [1] items in the deluxe starter pack include: tri-guard helm tri-guard armor green ward static flash chilling duelist red saber only one pack can be redeemed per account.

iron buckler.name: iron buckler
iron buckler.description: a beaten, little buckler made of iron that can withstand a bit more abuse than a proto shield.

proto shield.name: proto shield
proto shield.description: a small shield issued to all spiral knights recruits.
proto shield.notes: this item has been available since release 2011-04-04 when the game officially launched. unlike other shields, it seems to be incapable of shield bumping .

drakon t1.description: the drakon is a battle sprite that embodies fiery destruction. its skills focus on raw, offensive power.
drakon t1.notes: the drakon was the second battle sprite to get a reskin. the 2-2 mission: a revelation in flames features this sprite.
